It does have one unique feature, though - a first-floor conservatory on stilts. Can he find a way of getting its grandeur back? George also has his work cut out tackling a 380-year-old Jacobean cottage

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm angles for promotion by arranging for Diane to date his playboy boss - but neglects to tell her about it beforehand. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam decides hes had enough of the continual bickering between Diane and Carla and tells them they must resolve the bitter feelings between the pair. Ted Danson stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach develops a foolproof technique for wooing women and astonishes everyone by vying with Sam for the attentions of a new neighbour. Ted Danson and Nicholas Colasanto star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is upset to hear Debra has been discussing intimate details of their marriage with her gossipy friends - and responds by revealing a few secrets of his own. Guest starring Maggie Wheeler (Friends)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is elated to be signed up by a modelling agency, convinced fame and wealth are just around the corner - but his dreams of success prove short-lived. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A stranger reveals to the Barones that Frank used to be his mentor - much to the bemusement of Ray and Robert, who find it hard to believe their father could ever have inspired anyone. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink pulls out all the stops to compose a new theme tune for his radio show - but fails to appreciate what is required. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink is delighted to land a date with a former prom queen, but soon learns the hard way that beauty is only skin deep. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: An unlikely sequence of events culminates in Martin pretending to be gay on Valentines Day. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A temporary call-screener steals the show with her own brand of no-nonsense advice, leaving Frasier feeling insecure. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay applies his gastronomic and business acumen to Simmer Down Cafe in Georgetown, Texas, whose owner Chris Marino wishes to attract a younger, richer clientele. Chris has asked his brother Albert to come out of retirement to help with the business, but struggles with the notion that things can function properly without his presence

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole head to north Wales, where things kick off with a bang when Henry finds an antique cannon in antique dealers Sue and Joshs storage shed. Simon finds a croquet set in need of restoration and shows his restorer Gemma how to play the game

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Return of the documentary following Matt Baker and his family. The clans farm is more manageable than ever before, but as the worst storm to hit the area in living memory strikes, many of the changes theyve made have been destroyed

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Mike Bubbins in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jill and Ronnie have dreamt of moving to France for many years. Now their children are all grown up, the time seems right for them to take this big step. Jasmine Harman lines up five options for their £250,000 budget. Will Jill and Ronnie love any of them enough to make one their new home?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Italy, Lisa and Paul open two holiday let apartments. In Portugal, friends Richard and Simon call on the community to raise the funds to lease and renovate a much-loved abandoned bar. In France, couple Mark and Gary begin to renovate an old cognac distillery into a high-end luxury gîte

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination is 527-year-old pub, the Crown Inn in Kent, where guests experience spooky tales of the old boozers spectral resident and a boisterous bout of drag bingo

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Content creator Lizzy is first to host in Sheffield, serving up a Mexican-themed night involving a build-your-own burrito bonanza for mains and an unexpected surprise for dessert

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: The property expert and her family transform a run-down Spanish villa. In this first episode, Jasmine and husband Jon show their children the villa that they hope to call home. But with various delays and a mortgage deadline, its a race against the clock to see if the purchase of the villa will even go through

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Batch from Scratch: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Joe Swash and Suzanne Mulholland head to Nottingham to help a busy NHS family with two energetic children whose mealtimes are completely out of control. Emma is juggling shift work, clubs, cooking and a painful spinal condition, while Matts long shifts mean he rarely cooks. Their hectic schedule has left them short on time, short on energy and spending almost £400 a week on food, with 22 shopping trips in a week

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Doctors treat 15-year-old Meldred, who has been stabbed in the thigh by a stranger while walking to school, and are concerned that the knife may have caused significant damage or internal bleeding. The medical staff also try to diagnose what is wrong with sports commentator Andrew, who has an inflamed ankle with blood spots and a rash, and treat 11-year-old Penelope, who has hurt her finger falling in the playground

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Predator turns on Predator, as one player puts friendship above the brutal demands of the game. But will their loyalty be rewarded, or seal their fate in the cull? As another player goes all-out to undermine their biggest threat, feuds intensify, leading to a shocking turn of events during the cull and sparking a fiery, emotional clash that sets new rivalries alight

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Molly-Mae Hague, Richard Herring, JoJo Siwa and Babatunde Aleshe join hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond and judges Cherish Finden and Paul Hollywood in the tent. The celebrity bakers take on decorated traybakes in the Signature and a tarte tatin Technical, then reveal their most coveted toys from childhood in showstopping biscuits

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers settle in for The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer, Saturday Night Live UK, Britains Got Talent, The Hunt: Prey vs Predator, Celebrity Sabotage, Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen, The Dog House and BBC News on Easter egg inflation

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Jess and Ben reveal a love of nudism and a desire to make the transition from the naturist scene to a non-monogamous lifestyle. However, Jesss hatred of social situations must first be conquered. Elsewhere, Kirsty and Tom have the opportunity to take a giant leap in opening their relationship by having bisexual experiences with the retreats residents and consider attending a huge orgy

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Emmas new shop is flourishing - and so is romance with the handsome David. But love has let her down before, and she finds herself torn between following her heart and revenge on the Fairleys. Meanwhile, a newly sober Adele crashes back into Fairley Hall, jeopardising Adam and Olivias affair and Edwins upcoming marriage to Priya. In the 1970s, Emma commands her granddaughter Paula to break off her romance with Jim Fairley, forcing Paula to choose between her grandmother and her lover

programme.desc: Though Joey is thrilled when his name is used in a magazine crossword puzzle, he is reluctant to let the publication do a profile of him after his last magazine interview got him fired. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Baby Shower
programme.desc: Rachel panics at the thought of caring for her baby and reluctantly agrees to her mother moving in - much to Rosss annoyance. Chandler tries to help Joey prepare for his audition as a TV quiz show host by constantly playing a baffling game

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Cooking Class
programme.desc: Phoebe holds a job interview coaching session for a nervous Chandler, and Ross unwittingly makes Rachel jealous by flirting with a sales assistant. Monica is stung by a restaurant reviewers comments and joins his cookery class to persuade him to reconsider his opinion

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Is Late
programme.desc: Phoebe and Monica have fun placing bets on when Rachels overdue baby will arrive, while Chandler accompanies Joey to the premiere of his new film - and promptly falls asleep

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. As Rachels labour begins and expectant father Ross paces the corridors, the rest of the gang finds the hospital the perfect place for romance. Phoebe courts a handsome patient, while Monica and Chandler decide there is no time like the present to start a family of their own

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Rachel finally gives birth after enduring 21 hours in labour - but Phoebe cannot understand why Ross and the new mother are apart. Meanwhile, Joey finds Rosss engagement ring and accidently proposes to the vulnerable new mother

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No One Proposes
programme.desc: Joey tries to tell Rachel that he did not really propose, but cannot get a moment alone with her. Monica and Chandler continue trying for a baby - much to the horror of Mr Geller, who catches them in the caretakers cupboard

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler falls asleep in a meeting - with disastrous consequences. Meanwhile, Rachel desperately searches for a solution to baby Emmas non-stop crying and Ross breaks his finger trying to punch Joey

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica accepts a job as chef at arenownedManhattan restaurant, while Chandler decides to split his working week between Tulsa and New York. Phoebe and Joey agree to find dates for each other and Rachels paediatrician drops her from his list of clients because she keeps pestering him about Emma

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes fear that she may be about to lose her latest boyfriend is compounded by Rosss foolish comments. Monica makes a startling discovery about Chandler while visiting him in Tulsa, and Joey is upset to learn his date does not remember having previously slept with him

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Phoebes Birthday Dinner
programme.desc: The pals eagerly look forward to Phoebes birthday dinner at a fancy restaurant, but Chandler and Monica have an argument just before setting off. Meanwhile, Ross creates a domestic crisis by locking himself and Rachel out of the flat - with Emma inside. Directed by and starring David Schwimmer, with Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Male Nanny
programme.desc: Ross mocks Rachels decision to hire a sensitive male nanny, while Phoebes love life is complicated by the return of former boyfriend David, who left for a job in Minsk but now wants to rekindle their relationship. Guest starring Freddie Prinze Jr and Hank Azaria

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Inappropriate Song
programme.desc: Ross makes Emma laugh by singing Baby Got Back, while Joey and Chandler find an incriminating video in Richards old apartment with a familiar face in a leading role. Phoebe fails to impress her boyfriends parents, who encourage him to date someone else, forcing him to declare his love for her

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Other Sister
programme.desc: Rachels sister Amy joins the gang for Thanksgiving, and Monica worries about her best china getting damaged. Meanwhile, Joey forgets to turn up for the Days of Our Lives cast float. Guest starring Christina Applegate

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Phone Number
programme.desc: Chandler returns from Tulsa to visit Monica, but has to hide from Joey after rejecting his offer of free basketball tickets. Rachel goes out with Phoebe for a night on the town, while Ross and Mike find they have nothing in common

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Christmas in Tulsa
programme.desc: Chandler feels glum at having to spend Christmas in Tulsa, so a workmate stays behind to keep him company. Unfortunately, she ends up making a pass at him, prompting him to take drastic action and quit his job altogether. Guest starring Selma Blair

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Goes Back to Work
programme.desc: Rachel visits work to show off her baby and immediately clashes with the temp standing in for her, convinced he is trying to steal her job. Phoebe causes havoc on the set of Joeys TV show, while Chandler and Monica reconsider starting a family. Guest starring Dermot Mulroney

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to make amends with work rival Gavin, but realises she will never get along with him. Ross urges Joey to stay away from Emmas new nanny, while Phoebe and Mike adopt a litter of rats. Melissa George and Dermot Mulroney guest star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross enlists Chandler to help him make Rachel jealous. Monica gets the chance to perform at Mikes nightclub and Joey seeks help to disguise a botched eyebrow-waxing. Guest starring Dermot Mulroney and Melissa George

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Blind Dates
programme.desc: In an effort to remind Rachel and Ross of their former happiness together, Joey and Phoebe set them up with their worst possible blind dates, while baby Emma causes problems for Monica and Chandlers love life. Guest starring Jon Lovitz

programme.title: Twins (1988)
programme.desc: An unlikely pair of brothers, who were born as the result of a one-off genetic experiment and separated at birth, are reunited in adulthood. Comedy, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Danny DeVito, Kelly Preston and Chloe Webb

programme.desc: Part two of two. Rachel finally gives birth after enduring 21 hours in labour - but Phoebe cannot understand why Ross and the new mother are apart. Meanwhile, Joey finds Rosss engagement ring and accidently proposes to the vulnerable new mother

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No One Proposes
programme.desc: Joey tries to tell Rachel that he did not really propose, but cannot get a moment alone with her. Monica and Chandler continue trying for a baby - much to the horror of Mr Geller, who catches them in the caretakers cupboard

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler falls asleep in a meeting - with disastrous consequences. Meanwhile, Rachel desperately searches for a solution to baby Emmas non-stop crying and Ross breaks his finger trying to punch Joey

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica accepts a job as chef at arenownedManhattan restaurant, while Chandler decides to split his working week between Tulsa and New York. Phoebe and Joey agree to find dates for each other and Rachels paediatrician drops her from his list of clients because she keeps pestering him about Emma

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes fear that she may be about to lose her latest boyfriend is compounded by Rosss foolish comments. Monica makes a startling discovery about Chandler while visiting him in Tulsa, and Joey is upset to learn his date does not remember having previously slept with him

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Phoebes Birthday Dinner
programme.desc: The pals eagerly look forward to Phoebes birthday dinner at a fancy restaurant, but Chandler and Monica have an argument just before setting off. Meanwhile, Ross creates a domestic crisis by locking himself and Rachel out of the flat - with Emma inside. Directed by and starring David Schwimmer, with Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Male Nanny
programme.desc: Ross mocks Rachels decision to hire a sensitive male nanny, while Phoebes love life is complicated by the return of former boyfriend David, who left for a job in Minsk but now wants to rekindle their relationship. Guest starring Freddie Prinze Jr and Hank Azaria

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Inappropriate Song
programme.desc: Ross makes Emma laugh by singing Baby Got Back, while Joey and Chandler find an incriminating video in Richards old apartment with a familiar face in a leading role. Phoebe fails to impress her boyfriends parents, who encourage him to date someone else, forcing him to declare his love for her

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Other Sister
programme.desc: Rachels sister Amy joins the gang for Thanksgiving, and Monica worries about her best china getting damaged. Meanwhile, Joey forgets to turn up for the Days of Our Lives cast float. Guest starring Christina Applegate

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Phone Number
programme.desc: Chandler returns from Tulsa to visit Monica, but has to hide from Joey after rejecting his offer of free basketball tickets. Rachel goes out with Phoebe for a night on the town, while Ross and Mike find they have nothing in common

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Christmas in Tulsa
programme.desc: Chandler feels glum at having to spend Christmas in Tulsa, so a workmate stays behind to keep him company. Unfortunately, she ends up making a pass at him, prompting him to take drastic action and quit his job altogether. Guest starring Selma Blair

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Goes Back to Work
programme.desc: Rachel visits work to show off her baby and immediately clashes with the temp standing in for her, convinced he is trying to steal her job. Phoebe causes havoc on the set of Joeys TV show, while Chandler and Monica reconsider starting a family. Guest starring Dermot Mulroney

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to make amends with work rival Gavin, but realises she will never get along with him. Ross urges Joey to stay away from Emmas new nanny, while Phoebe and Mike adopt a litter of rats. Melissa George and Dermot Mulroney guest star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross enlists Chandler to help him make Rachel jealous. Monica gets the chance to perform at Mikes nightclub and Joey seeks help to disguise a botched eyebrow-waxing. Guest starring Dermot Mulroney and Melissa George

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Blind Dates
programme.desc: In an effort to remind Rachel and Ross of their former happiness together, Joey and Phoebe set them up with their worst possible blind dates, while baby Emma causes problems for Monica and Chandlers love life. Guest starring Jon Lovitz

programme.title: Twins (1988)
programme.desc: An unlikely pair of brothers, who were born as the result of a one-off genetic experiment and separated at birth, are reunited in adulthood. They set out on a cross-country search for their unknown mother - fending off vicious loan sharks and a professional assassin along the way. Comedy, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Danny DeVito, Kelly Preston and Chloe Webb

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.desc: Henry Cole takes his trusty steed Mavis to the Welsh valleys. The old 1940s Norton might not be the quickest of bikes, but when travelling through such beautiful scenery, the last thing anyone wants to be doing is going too quickly

programme.title: Worlds Greatest Motorcycle Rides
programme.desc: Henry Cole climbs aboard the brand new Norton Domiracer to take on the A-roads of East Anglia, where he grew up. Domiracer is eager to eat up the miles, but Henry wants to stop at some of the places he used to go as a youngster

programme.title: Worlds Greatest Motorcycle Rides
programme.desc: Henry Cole potters through the Highlands of Scotland on his brand new Honda Africa Twin, a versatile bike perfect for the route known as the Tartan Titan. The jump-off point is the great old Cameraon Hotel on the banks of Loch Lomond

programme.title: Three Men Four Wheels
programme.desc: Marino takes his mates to see arguably the most successful Formula One car of all time - the Lotus 72. His drive in this iconic car turns out to be an emotional experience

programme.title: Three Men Four Wheels
programme.desc: Broadcaster Andy Jaye champions the car in which Paddy Hopkirk famously won the 1964 Monte Carlo. Can Andy get a doubtful Marino on board with the Mini Cooper S?

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs
programme.desc: Chads final build of the season is the centrepiece of his clients New Years Eve celebration, and the team scramble to work to the tight deadline

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic

programme.desc: Ant finds a rare 1978 Land Rover Series 3, a dream find for a Landie fanatic. But the bulkhead is riddled with rust, which could dent Ants profit

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic
programme.desc: Ant hopes restoring and selling a 1980 Triumph Dolomite Sprint will help kickstart his farmhouse renovation. But will rust problems erode his profit?

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic
programme.desc: Ant has found an iconic VW Campervan thats been abandoned mid-restoration. The interior needs a full refit, plus a suspension overhaul

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Back in Northern Ireland, bike guru Henry Cole and ace mechanic Sam Lovegrove discover some lovely vintage cars as well as some modern motors. What will they take home?

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Sam are in the Cotswolds to visit the largest sidecar manufacturer in Britain. They uncover a rusty Lancia Aurelia and a Royal Enfield 500

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: In Somerset, Sam and Henry meet a man whos been collecting cars since 1963. The guys are excited to uncover an Austin 7 and a De Dion-Bouton

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Sam and Henry visit one of Britains biggest dealers in second-hand milk floats. This quirky collection features a beautiful 1959 Chevrolet El Camino

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: With the Ford Focus having its 25th anniversary, Mike thinks the ST model may be the next classic. He nabs a bargain, but Elvis finds the engine needs a full rebuild

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: After years of searching, Mikes found the ultimate 80s hot hatch: the Renault 5 GT Turbo. Can Elvis restore it in time for its new owners birthday?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike Brewer finds one of only 1,000 Mini Cooper S MC40s ever made, the 40th anniversary homage to the Monte Carlo rally-winning British icon

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The four lads decide to play truant from sixth form and buy alcohol for an all-day drinking session, which is interrupted when Neils father comes home early. Meanwhile, Simon decides to declare his love for Carli through graffiti, and the friends face the wrath of their parents

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Self-confessed nerd and Star Wars fan Lachlan and south London supermarket worker Luke return to the restaurant for another pair of blind dates, after things didnt work out last time. Meanwhile, it may be tough finding love for people wrapped up in the nine to five, but young professionals Louisa and Cameron leave thoughts of the daily grind at the door when they meet for their date, and 42-year-old Dan and 39-year-old Adam hope to find that certain spark

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Nanny Jo, who has grown up knowing she is bisexual but has only ever had relationships with men, embarks on her first date with a woman. programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria uses her time with the twins as an opportunity to secretly baptise them before Haley and Dylan get home. programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron and Mitchells friends mistakenly assume they have split up, while Haley attempts to cook Thanksgiving dinner as a thank you for Claire and Phils support with the twins. Meanwhile, Phil thinks he has a chance to reclaim his dignity after their first outing 10 years ago went so wrong when Jay invites him and Dylan along to fly his model plane

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam tries to keep his big interview a secret, but just ends up making Mitch suspicious. Haley cannot wait for a festive glass of wine

programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastians, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of the Olde Stone Mill restaurant in Tuckahoe, New York, which is struggling to attract customers, leading to debts of nearly $1million. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job as an estate agent, but her honesty with potential buyers costs her lucrative sales and gets her into hot water with the boss, who issues an ultimatum. The Flanders agree to buy one of the agencys houses - unaware of the propertys gruesome past

programme.desc: A sleazy carnival worker and his son lose their jobs thanks to Homer, and end up moving in with the Simpson family - whose home they proceed to take over and completely wreck. With the guest voice of Jim Varney

programme.desc: Phil and Luke spend father-son time together searching for hidden treasures beneath the house, Mitch and Cam cause embarrassment by inviting Lilys paediatrician to lunch, and Haley takes her driving test

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Sara Bittorf goes undercover among the workforce of restaurant chain Boston Market, where she is chief brand officer. Disguising herself as an out-of-work waitress trying to win the chance to open up her own eatery by taking part in a bogus reality TV show, she tries to revive the companys image by learning more about its staff

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples host dinner parties in the Spanish resort of Marbella as they competes for the cash prize of £1,000. Stephen and his Colombian boyfriend Juan plan to keep things simple in the kitchen, but two of their guests point out that the chicken is overcooked. At Glenn and Henriettes Mexican evening, the contestants get competitive when theyre let loose on a pinata, and Tristan and Louise hope to inject love into their dinner party - until Stephen gives them frank feedback on the food

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples compete for the cash prize in Marbella. Extrovert Jojo and partner Adrian kick off the competition with their 1970s-inspired menu, while day two sees young, fun-loving Mark and Zoe plan an international-themed menu. Finally its Caz and Daves turn to host with their Jewish-inspired family menu, but which pair will secure the £1,000 prize for best-staged soiree remains to be seen

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Birmingham compete for the £1,000 cash prize, with married couple Veda and Varun kicking off the competition with a Bollywood bash and an Indian-themed menu. Engaged pair Rachel and Ann aim to impress with their home-cooked favourites on night two, while the last evening sees Su and Dave throw a Mad Hatter-style tea party with costumes to suit

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Birmingham, English teacher Corinne and her partner Dal are the first to host in a series of dinner parties, but their evening takes a strange turn when some of the guests prove to be very outspoken. Builder Jack and girlfriend Georgie manage to get their fellow contestants back on side with their food and hosting, and by the time IT workers James and Adele host, expectations are high

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiellos in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owners fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordons help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partners parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jacks Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chefs advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of the owners of Hannah and Masons, a French bistro in Cranbury, New Jersey. Members of staff complain their pay cheques bounce, and the kitchen cooler is so unhygienic that Gordon makes the decision to close the restaurant on Valentines Day - the busiest night of the year

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, where the three owners regularly come into conflict as they each try to assert their authority over the business, causing confusion for all. When one of the trio stubbornly resists the changes the Scottish chef is hoping to implement, sparks begin to fly

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts a combination of the comedy panel show and the long-running words-and-numbers quiz, with Jon Richardson and Amy Gledhill taking on Richard Ayoade and Guz Khan. Mathematician Rachel Riley looks after the letters and numbers, while Sam Campbell joins lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Greg Davies: Firing Cheeseballs at a Dog
programme.desc: Comedian Greg Daviess hugely successful and acclaimed debut stand-up show from 2011, in which he sets out to chronicle the significant issues surrounding modern life in his own irreverent style. A hit at the Edinburgh Festival, it was nominated for the Edinburgh Comedy Award before going on a sell-out, UK-wide tour

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: Fran returns from holiday and discovers Manny has resigned and started work at Goliath Books, leaving Bernard to run the shop alone. After sifting through rubbish, rotting food and dead badgers, she resolves to get the errant employee back - but his new boss has no intention of letting him go. With Dylan Moran, Bill Bailey and Tamsin Greig, and guest star Simon Pegg

programme.title: Black Books

programme.desc: Car salesman Paul and his partner Sara host first in Sheffield, but their evening is dogged by bickering. Meanwhile, Phil thinks he has a chance to reclaim his dignity after their first outing 10 years ago went so wrong when Jay invites him and Dylan along to fly his model plane

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam tries to keep his big interview a secret, but just ends up making Mitch suspicious. Haley cannot wait for a festive glass of wine

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastians, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. Gordon is horrified to discover pre-processed and frozen ingredients on the menu, but there seems to be little he can do to help when he is thrown out of the kitchen

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of Finn McCools, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, New York. The chances of the establishment becoming a success are being ruined by the owner Buddy Mazzios two sons, bartender Jason and chef Brian, who are constantly fighting with each other, prompting Gordon to have a heart-to-heart with the family

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of the Olde Stone Mill restaurant in Tuckahoe, New York, which is struggling to attract customers, leading to debts of nearly $1million. Gordon feels the owner is more interested in his own appearance than how his food tastes and a screaming match ensues

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Intimacy Week reaches boiling point as one couples relationship threatens to implode, while a bride makes a decision that breaks her grooms heart

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The dinner party descends into chaos when a shock return re-ignites old feuds and exposes fresh cracks in multiple marriages

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Apus mother arrives in Springfield to organise his arranged marriage to the daughter of a family friend, but he is unwilling to have his future decided for him and pretends he already has a wife - Marge

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Dad Who Knew Too Little
programme.desc: Homer realises he knows very little about Lisa and tries to fill the gaps in his knowledge by hiring a dodgy private detective to spy on her - only to end up on the wrong side of the law. With the guest voice of Elliott Gould

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa goes on an archaeological dig with the school, and uncovers an unusual fossil, which the townsfolk are convinced is the skeleton of an angel. Thinking he can make a profit out of the find, Homer steals it, puts it in his garage, and charges people to see it. With the guest voice of scientist Stephen Jay Gould

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job as an estate agent, but her honesty with potential buyers costs her lucrative sales and gets her into hot water with the boss, who issues an ultimatum. The Flanders agree to buy one of the agencys houses - unaware of the propertys gruesome past

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart accidentally destroys the familys Christmas presents and evades blame by claiming they were stolen by a burglar, prompting the Springfield residents to open their hearts and wallets in an overwhelming show of charity toward the family. With the guest voice of American TV presenter Alex Trebek

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer rents a Western for the family to watch, but is disappointed when it turns out to be a musical, so the family reminds him of musical highlights from past episodes. Featuring the guest voice of George Harrison

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A sleazy carnival worker and his son lose their jobs thanks to Homer, and end up moving in with the Simpson family - whose home they proceed to take over and completely wreck. With the guest voice of Jim Varney

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: The teams travel to the beautiful Indian coastal state of Kerala. Navigating the waterways of the West Coast Canal System, the celeb pairs must choose between tiger body painting or a traditional kids game, before an intense experience learning to drive a tuk-tuk. Finally, they must eat their way through a bowlful of bananas until they find a blue one, with one duo getting more than a gutful

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Mr Burns fight for the soul of brash young football prodigy Grayson Mathers

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer and Marge are lost in an icy wilderness, they must push themselves to their limits to survive

programme.title: The Inbetweeners 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Will, Simon and Neil find university life does not live up to their expectations, and are insanely jealous of Jays stories of his gap year in Australia. Heading Down Under to meet their friend, they inevitably discover he has exaggerated his escapades - so decide to go in search of a real adventure. Damon Beesley and Iain Morriss blockbusting comedy sequel spun off from the hit sitcom, starring Simon Bird, James Buckley, Joe Thomas and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: With his parents recently divorced, privately educated Will has to move to a new area and make friends at the local comprehensive, where he meets Simon, Jay and Neil. First episode of the comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The four lads decide to play truant from sixth form and buy alcohol for an all-day drinking session, which is interrupted when Neils father comes home early. Meanwhile, Simon decides to declare his love for Carli through graffiti, and the friends face the wrath of their parents

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The second Commitment Ceremony erupts with accusations, heartbreak and a shock exit as alliances fracture, one marriage ends and the experiment is left permanently shaken

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics sit down to watch Squid Game: The Challenge - the real-life version of the Netflix hit - and get hot under the collar with Channel 4s swinging drama The Couple Next Door. Plus, The Toy Hospital, Survivor, Vinnie Jones in the Country, Tony Robinsons Marvellous Machines and Lorraine. From December 2023

programme.title: Monster Hunter (2020)
programme.desc: When Cpt Artemis and her loyal soldiers are transported to a new world, they engage in a desperate battle for survival against enormous enemies with incredible powers. Fantasy adventure based on the video game, starring Milla Jovovich, Tony Jaa and Ron Perlman

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Tired of the familys obsession with electronic gadgets, Claire and Phil declare a household challenge to see who can stay unplugged the longest. Mitch and Cameron frantically try to get Lily into the best pre-school, while Jay and Manny are concerned at the lengths to which Gloria will go to stop the neighbours dog barking

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Mercedes is determined to find out what Jensons up to, Ste makes a big decision, and a sister is backed into a corner. Warren decides who he wants, but is he too late? Friends gather around to support Diane and Tony, Rex braves his first public outing while experimenting with his image. At The Loft relaunch party, a shocking turn of events puts all eyes on Mercedes

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren decides who he wants, but he may be too late, and friends gather around to support Diane and Tony

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their authentic Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Geoff struggles to balance demands from the Jenkintown Posse and Erica. Meanwhile, Adam faces a crisis of confidence over his career path

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Valentines Day approaches, Barry is shocked when an attractive teaching assistant agrees to go out with him. Meanwhile, Adam and Dana worry that theyve missed their chance with their new crushes

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Luke spend father-son time together searching for hidden treasures beneath the house, Mitch and Cam cause embarrassment by inviting Lilys paediatrician to lunch, and Haley takes her driving test

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil finds himself in an awkward situation when he meets his former high-school girlfriend, who confesses she still has feelings for him, while Mitchell stands up to his boss and Jay summons up the courage to confess he killed Mannys turtle

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The dinner party descends into chaos when a shock return re-ignites old feuds and exposes fresh cracks in multiple marriages

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A sexual health adviser with two soon-to-be-married daughters goes looking for love, and a part-time singer enjoys an evening with a professional magician. Other visitors to the restaurant include an accountant contemplating parenthood, a car enthusiast who has been single for seven years, and a call-centre worker who has yet to fall in love

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Atlanta, Georgia, in an attempt to save a family-run smokehouse restaurant plagued by mismanagement and lazy cooking. Michons owner, Al Wilson, had always hoped he could pass his beloved business on to daughter Natalie, but when he suffered a collapsed lung the handover came about much earlier than expected. Now its down to Gordon to motivate Natalie and save Michons from disaster

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner uses his Counter Truancy Unit to thwart a possible terror attack at Springfield Elementarys Annual Bake Sale. Rogue agent Bart could be the only hope of stopping the plot - until he clashes with Jack Bauer, who is on an important mission of his own. With the voices of 24s Kiefer Sutherland and Mary-Lynn Rajskub

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: You Kent Always Say What You Want
programme.desc: Homer accidentally causes the sacking of newsreader Kent Brockman - who moves in with the family and sets about trying to win his job back by conducting a high-profile campaign against unethical media practices. With the voice of rapper Ludacris

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mother when she finds out that Alex has a crush on a boy, and Haleys idea of sisterly advice is not helping matters. Meanwhile, Mitchell and Cameron have an argument over the formers aversion to public displays of affection, and Gloria believes that her grandmother has been visiting in her dreams. Comedy, starring Ed ONeill

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: An earthquake strikes, leaving Claire stuck in the bathroom with a plumber. Meanwhile, the tremor causes Manny to experience an existential crisis, and Mitchell struggles to remain calm. Comedy, guest starring Nathan Lane (The Producers)

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The dinner party descends into chaos when a shock return re-ignites old feuds and exposes fresh cracks in multiple marriages

programme.title: Dance Moms: A New Era
programme.sub-title: Out with the Bleu, in with the New
programme.desc: With the dramatic fall of Studio Bleu fresh in the mind, coach Glo has a new endeavour - Project X - and shes not just a teacher anymore, shes now also a Dance Mom too, with her daughter Kaeli coaching by her side. On the dancefloor, Smiley and Leilah compete for the first solo of the season, while Ashlan struggles to live up to her past glories

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trip to an amusement park ends in disarray, prompting Homer to question the behaviour of his fellow man - and leading to an invitation for him to join a survivalist group preparing for the end of the world. As usual, its left to Marge to talk some sense into her hubby. Featuring the guest voice of music legend Tom Waits

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield Elementary is threatened with closure over poor test scores, until it is revealed that one student missed the exam and could potentially save the school with an above-average mark. Unfortunately, that pupil turns out to be Bart - can he pull it out of the bag?

programme.title: First Dates

programme.desc: Will tries to reinvent the boys image by taking them clubbing around London, but Simon is unsure whether to go until Carli shows an interest in the outing. programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: The chef travels to South Wales, where he is accompanied by Michelin-starred chef Stephen Terry. Here, James cooks a Welsh lamb ragu on a beautiful mountainside

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present a Bake Off first as the amateurs take part in German week, in which the amateurs attempt to perfect traditional German biscuits in the signature, followed by a technical torte fit for a prince. Finally, they must rise to the challenge by creating a showstopping tiered cake using yeast. Who will be saying auf wiedersehen? Herr Hollywood and Frau Leith have the answer

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host pastry week, which sees the amateur bakers make signature choux pastry doughnuts and tackle a tricky Turkish technical, before creating a savoury showstopper where they must pack a pastry pie with flavour as well as a delicate design. Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood are on hand to taste the results, before deciding who will be leaving the tent this week

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present as the bakers put their twist on a classic caramel tart and produce a family favourite biscuit bar in the technical, before creating a showstopping dessert encased in a sugar dome. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts, deciding who will win star baker and who will be going home

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers explore alternative ingredients during free-from week. The signature requires them to bake without dairy, before a hearty vegan technical and finally towering showstopping celebration cakes that must be entirely free-from gluten. With a place in the semi-final at stake, who will win the coveted star baker title and who will be leaving the Bake Off tent?

programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present as the bakers put their twist on a classic caramel tart and produce a family favourite biscuit bar in the technical, before creating a showstopping dessert encased in a sugar dome. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts, deciding who will win star baker and who will be going home

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers explore alternative ingredients during free-from week. The signature requires them to bake without dairy, before a hearty vegan technical and finally towering showstopping celebration cakes that must be entirely free-from gluten. With a place in the semi-final at stake, who will win the coveted star baker title and who will be leaving the Bake Off tent?

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programme.desc: Adam ticks Yorkshire Pudding in Yorkshire off his foodie bucket list. Then, he tries Yorkshire parkin, local rabbit, and a Yorkshire tea-inspired dessert

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programme.desc: Adam heads to Kent to try a very special sandwich in Sandwich. There, he also tries Whitstable oysters, traditional fish and chips, and a new baked sensation, the cruffin

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver gives more of the nations favourite dishes a twist, making sticky toffee pudding with his mother Sally and rustling up a mouth-watering steak and onion sandwich. The chef also prepares an Italian classic - osso buco with saffron risotto

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver puts his stamp on three comfort food classics. First up is a retro treat - chicken Kiev, before the chef prepares spaghetti vongole with a non-traditional pink twist and a deluxe shepherds pie made with slow-roasted lamb shoulder rather than mince

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Monica Galetti for a culinary journey around Oxford, where they pay a visit to Raymond Blanc at his restaurant Le Manoir aux QuatSaisons, and sample some of his award-winning dishes. They take a trip up the river to a farm where they pick raspberries for a pudding, and James prepares a chicken dish with morels in the grounds of Raymonds restaurant

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a chef in Kansas City who serves a dressed-up version of comfort food, with dishes including chicken pot pie and steamed mussels

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits an old-time bar in Denver making tater tots, pork rinds and a pastrami sandwich

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Miami where an Asian-fusion restaurant serves up Brussels sprouts and a duck sous-vide sandwich

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: A visit to Miami where a law student changed careers to prepare comfort food such as spicy oxtail and ragu

programme.desc: A man is accused of stabbing an off-licence clerk, but his defence depends on the dodgy evidence offered by his boss. Courtroom drama, starring Leo McKern

Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Gerard and Maxine from Doncaster, Sam and Ellie from Newbury, and Chris and her daughter Sally from Hull use their powers of deduction to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords. Adil Ray hosts

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Five vicars answer Top 10 list questions and attempt to land a Perfect 10 to win a cash prize for a cause close to their hearts in the quiz show hosted by Warwick Davis.

programme.title: In with a Shout
programme.desc: The Hinds family from London and the Woolliscrofts from Manchester try to answer questions, the correct responses to which are hidden within a montage of moving images displayed on TV screens. Game show, hosted by Joel Dommett

programme.title: Riddiculous
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Ranvir Singh in which Debbie and Lily, Olivia and Mekhi, and Jake and Dee take on Riddlemaster Henry Lewis. They attempt to answer general knowledge questions and confusing conundrums, with only one team making it through to the high-stakes final with a chance to win a cash prize

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts as contestant Taylor tries to open the 22 red boxes in the right order, taking on the infamous Banker for the chance to win a life-changing cash prize

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Hemel Hempstead husband and wife Hari and Rasika, Merseyside couple Kellie and Eric, and Northern Irish father and son Tony and Laurence use their powers of deduction to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords. The last remaining duo have the opportunity to win the money theyve banked earlier in the show to potentially double their winnings, or leaving with nothing. Adil Ray hosts

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Jane and Mick from Chesterfield, multilingual Bilal and husband Joe from London, and couple Scarlett and Walter from London try to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords. Presented by Adil Ray

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Mad and Josh, a mother and son from Oxford, Chelmsford twins Prabin and Pallavi, and Gail and Genny, a mother and daughter from Belfast try to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords. Presented by Adil Ray

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Another line-up of contestants answer questions that could change their lives - with the four lifelines Ask the Audience, Phone a Friend, 50-50 and Ask the Host available to them if they get stuck. Jeremy Clarkson hosts

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: A family team of five join forces to take on the Tenable Tower, but have they got what it takes to score a Perfect 10 and win £125,000 in the quiz show?

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day (2012)
programme.desc: A man on a sailing holiday in Spain discovers his family have been abducted. His search for them leads him to learn that his father has been leading a double-life as a CIA agent, and has stolen top-secret information - which the kidnappers will stop at nothing to obtain. Thriller, starring Henry Cavill, Bruce Willis and Sigourney Weaver

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An opal ring possesses mysterious forces, enabling its wearer to see images of loved ones

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A car forces its owner to admit to a hit-and-run crime

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The 7 Adventures of Sinbad (2010)
programme.desc: Persian prince Sinbad is entrusted with completing seven seemingly impossible tasks to save humanity from an imminent catastrophe. Fantasy adventure, starring Patrick Muldoon, Sarah Desage, Bo Svenson and Dylan Jones

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The sergeant and his partner investigate a series of attacks on women, in which the assailant always leaves a Bible behind. However, the case proves tough to crack, and they come in for harsh criticism from a local journalist. Starring William Shatner and Adrian Zmed

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Cathy risks her life to help Hooker catch two drug dealers responsible for a teenagers death while working as a volunteer at City Hospital. Vintage police drama, starring William Shatner and Susan McClung

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Romano and Hooker pursue a van for a traffic violation and end up tackling a gang of ex-bikers involved in gun-running. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner as the beat cop determined to clean up the streets

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The sergeant and his partner Romano try to protect an important witness in a murder trial. Classic cop drama, starring William Shatner

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The cop is convinced that his latest murder investigation is linked to an unsolved case from eight-years ago and that he might be searching for a serial killer

programme.title: McLintock! (1963)
programme.desc: A hard-drinking cattle baron is determined to stop events spiralling out of control when his estranged wife turns up demanding a divorce. Meanwhile, an ardent suitor is pursuing his flighty daughter, and corrupt government agents are turning a blind eye to land grabbers. Comedy Western, starring John Wayne, Maureen OHara, Yvonne de Carlo, Patrick Wayne and Stefanie Powers

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: In Harms Way (1965)
programme.desc: Two Navy officers are disgraced in the aftermath of the attack on Pearl Harbour, one for a disastrous engagement with the enemy and the other for a drunken brawl after learning of his wifes death. They get another chance to prove their worth when they are placed in charge of a vital counter-offensive. Second World War drama, starring John Wayne, Kirk Douglas and Henry Fonda

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A space commander returns from a 30-year mission to find some things havent changed at all

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: The Self Improvement of Salvadore Ross
programme.desc: A man goes to extreme lengths to win back his girlfriend. Introduced by Rod Serling

programme.title: Below (2002)
programme.desc: A shell-shocked US submarine crew embarks on a routine mission in the Pacific during the Second World War. After stopping to pick up the three survivors of a torpedoed British hospital ship, an unrelenting series of terrifying and sinister events drives the crew into madness as they wander the claustrophobic corridors of their cramped vessel. Horror, starring Olivia Williams, Holt McCallany, Bruce Greenwood and Matthew Davis

programme.title: Centurion (2010)
programme.desc: A Roman legion is sent on a mission to crush a Pictish uprising, only to be nearly wiped out in a savage ambush. A centurion who survives the massacre takes charge of the survivors and leads them on a daring mission to rescue their captured general and make it back to their own territory alive. Neil Marshalls action thriller, with Michael Fassbender, Dominic West and Olga Kurylenko

programme.title: An Eye for an Eye (1981)
programme.desc: A karate-kicking cop is forced to resign after his partner is murdered by drug traffickers, so resolves to take the law into his own hands in order to get revenge. Thriller, starring Chuck Norris, Christopher Lee, Richard Roundtree and Matt Clark

programme.title: Memoirs of an Invisible Man (1992)
programme.desc: A successful but bored stockbroker receives an unexpected boost after he is made accidentally invisible in a scientific experiment. Unfortunately, he now has to go on the run from devious CIA agents who are determined to use him in their own nefarious schemes. Comedy spy thriller directed by John Carpenter, starring Chevy Chase, Daryl Hannah, Sam Neill, Michael McKean and Stephen Tobolowsky

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker faces a difficult case when investigating a county sheriff who is suspected of murdering a trucker who refused to help him smuggle drugs

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The cop is convinced that his latest murder investigation is linked to an unsolved case from eight-years ago and that he might be searching for a serial killer

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent tries to block the appointment of an alien to a vital post in the space programme. Classic sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: Beware! The Blob (1972)
programme.desc: After an oil pipeline engineer unknowingly brings home a frozen specimen of the original Blob from the North Pole, it defrosts, terrorises and consumes the locals. Sci-fi comedy horror sequel, starring Robert Walker Jr

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: The Great Alaskan Race (2019)
programme.desc: When a deadly epidemic strikes the children of Nome, Alaska, a group led by sled-dogs must travel 700 miles to bring them the vaccine. Drama, starring Brian Presley

programme.title: The War Lord (1965)
programme.desc: An 11th-century Norman knight is sent by the duke he serves to defend a druid village. Permitted under feudal law, he takes another mans wife, who falls in love with him and has no intention of returning to her husband. However, her vengeful spouse is outraged and ignites a civil war by influencing the knights brother to turn against him. Medieval drama, with Charlton Heston, Rosemary Forsyth, Richard Boone and Maurice Evans

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The Enterprise is hijacked by a group searching for the idyllic planet of Eden, but Kirk is stunned to discover the remarkable truth about the supposedly blissful paradise. Sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy and DeForest Kelley

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: A young girl witnesses the fiery death of an alien, but declares her belief that it was a vision. Classic sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: An old motor racing friend of Hooker is arrested for a series of hold-ups at local supermarkets, but the canny cop is not convinced of his guilt and sets out to bring the culprits to book - leading to a life-or-death chase round a secluded racetrack. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner and Adrian Zmed

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Detective Sandovil finds himself in a compromising situation when a gun used to kill a police officer is found in his nephews room

programme.title: Blitz (2011)
programme.desc: An uncompromising police detectives career is under threat when his violent methods are exposed by a reporter. However, he is kept on duty as he is considered the only man capable of stopping an elusive serial killer, one who is preying on police officers. Crime thriller, starring Jason Statham, Aidan Gillen, Paddy Considine and David Morrissey

programme.title: The Negotiator (1998)
programme.desc: Hostage negotiator Danny Roman is framed for murder and turns the tables by taking captives of his own to ensure his pleas of innocence are heard. His colleague Chris Sabian is sent in to reason with him and save the hostages, leading to a battle of wits as Roman tries to persuade him to take his side. Thriller, starring Samuel L Jackson, Kevin Spacey, David Morse, JT Walsh and Paul Giamatti

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt (2014)
programme.desc: District attorney Mitch Brockden is involved in a fatal hit-and-run incident, and a convicted felon is charged with his crime. Mitchs guilt drives him to throw out the case when it comes to trial - but when the accused later goes on a killing spree, he feels compelled to bring him to justice personally. Crime thriller, starring Dominic Cooper and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Money Plane (2020)
programme.desc: A professional thief who owes the mob money is forced to rob a futuristic flying casino filled with the worlds most dangerous criminals. Action, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Detective Sandovil finds himself in a compromising situation when a gun used to kill a police officer is found in his nephews room

programme.title: Mammoth (2006)
programme.desc: A sleepy town is thrown into turmoil when a meteor strikes the local museum, bringing a woolly mammoth residing in one of the display cases to life. The ancient beast goes on a violent rampage, leaving the residents with the task of hunting it down before it escapes into the outside world. Sci-fi thriller, starring Vincent Ventresca, Summer Glau, Tom Skerritt and Cole Williams

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Britains busiest air ambulance crews. In Lanchester, heli-medics struggle to free a man trapped in his mangled car. A tree surgeon falls from height in Ashdon, breaking his femur. A motorbike accident in the Peaks sees medics rushing to the aid of Jamie, who has a seriously damaged arm and other fractures

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A head-on car accident in Cumbria leaves Nicks life hanging in the balance, East Anglian heli-meds land on a roundabout island to help Craig who has come off his motorbike and smashed headfirst into a signpost. Plus, medics battle extreme weather conditions to reach a man trapped under his JCB digger

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Brian, 74, is brought into Kings by ambulance after falling backwards down a flight of stairs and being knocked unconscious at his partners house. Sylvester arrives in paediatric AandE with his two-year-old son, who has cut his forehead on a visit to church, while 70-year-old builder Leonard has lost sensation down his left side and the medics are worried he may have suffered a stroke

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Delivery driver Stuart from Aberdeen takes his fellow holiday-makers to an inflatable water park in Barcelona, where they bounce, splash and slide through an assault course. At dinner, things turns a little frosty before the winner is decided

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the first dinner date in Middlesbrough glamorous 41-year-old sales assistant Gail hosts a night full of sparkly gourmet grub and teaches her guests a lesson or two in beauty. Her guests are 52-year-old vintage shop owner Jane, 28-year-old football coach Dan, 57-year-old art enthusiast Julie and 47-year-old pub landlord Gary. Gail gets the glitter, sparklers and hair extensions out, but whether her food will get glowing reviews ramins to be seen

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Goalkeeping coach Dan hopes to thrill his guests with a James Bond evening in Middlesbrough, including 007-inspired food and a Bond villain. however, Julie and Jane fail to bond on the night, falling out over everything from whos been the best James Bond, to how to pronounce Roger Moore. Gary and Gail also fall out when the table chat turns to lookey-likeys. After dinner, Dan challenges his guests to put one past him in a penalty shoot-out, which ends with a surprising result

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Middlesbrough, pub landlord Gary plans a 1980s evening, serving classic dishes with a modern twist. However, Jane and Julie are still bickering and Gary falls out with Gail over his dessert. Showman Gary flambes his steaks at the table, and tops things off with a magic display that goes down well with all of his guests - except one

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vintage shop owner Jane serves up a retro menu and a vintage clothes competition in Middlesbrough. Janes been on the attack at the table so far, but shes planning to be the perfect host this time. On a lively night, theres more drama between the diners, and Julie and Gail discover that Jane has created headlines in the local news

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in Middlesbrough, Julies Indian menu gets mixed reviews, while Gail and Jane make a shoe discovery that leads to some shocking dinner table revelations. Gary finds out how much hes got on Janes nerves throughout the week, as the contestants candidly reveal what they think of each other

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Kent couple Alison and Lee are making a permanent move to the stunning countryside of Albox in Almería. They need a garden thats secure enough for their four dogs to roam safely, and the property must be big enough to host their six grown-up children and three grandchildren. Ben Hillman lines up some impressive properties for their budget of £150,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Lee Juggurnauth jets off to Spains Almería coast to help house-hunters Brian and Lorna find the perfect holiday home. The keen lawn bowlers plan to bring their pet dog Angus with them, so outside space is key. Lee shows them the very best of what their £150,000 budget can secure

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Georgina and Robert find a holiday home on the Caribbean island of St Lucia so they can visit Georginas family. On a budget of £200,000 Jean shows them the best the island has to offer

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Ben Hillman heads to the white-washed villages of Andalusia in southern Spain to help Sally and her friend Tarik find the perfect holiday home. Professional dog-sitter Sally first fell in love with Spain as a child and shes finally in a position to buy there. For moral support, she has invited her best friend of 20 years Tarik along on the search. Ben has five fantastic properties to show them for Sallys budget of £65,000, but will any of them be the perfect place for Sally?

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: A mother and daughter need help from Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer as their three-bedroom Victorian cottage in Great Bookham, Surrey is too small and dark. Mum Abi cannot bear to leave the place she lived with her partner, who passed away a few years ago. But daughter Maddy believes her mum needs a fresh start

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp is in Bournemouth, Dorset, with Mary Jane and Paul, single parents looking for the perfect home to bring their families together. However, a slow-moving market makes the search challenging with a first viewing that really does not go to plan. Phil Spencer is helping Alan and Nora, who have relocated to the seaside from Coventry with their four teenage children, and want to move on from their current rental property

programme.title: George Clarkes Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: George meets Yohance, who has bought an office unit on a commercial estate in London, which he plans to turn into a two-bedroom house. At £360,000 it was half the price of residential equivalents nearby, but its a cavernous, sterile and dark space, so the odds are stacked against him and his conversion. Is it even possible to make it the stylish and comfortable first home he wants?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Derwent House Apartments in Scarborough, North Yorkshire, run by Claire and her daughter-in-law, Jessica

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers visit Burton Constable Holiday Park in Sproatley run by Gemma and Mark. The lodges are initially a big hit but a nasty surprise ruins the stay for Claire and Jessica and Stephen gets hot under the collar. The situation improves at breakfast but theres a shock in the feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners visit The Crossings Inn near Carlisle, Cumbria. The guests are impressed by the cleanliness but bemused by the separate bathrooms. An afternoon on the farm gets everyone up close and personal with the local livestock and Stephen shares his farm-to-plate philosophy

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers head to Wales Conwy Valley, where self-confessed lady of the manor Jane and her friend Sharon host at Plas Maenan Country House. Jane lovingly restored her spectacular country pile to its former glory, and the breathtaking views prove popular. However, it seems her restoration work doesnt meet everyones standards, as some guests bemoan the patchy paintwork. The breakfast buffet the next morning also results in mixed appraisals

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day sees emotions are running high as the BandBers pore over their assessments. Derwent House Apartments are up first, with the hosts keen to turn up the heat on Jane and Sharons facilities feedback. Gemma and Mark from Burton Constable Holiday Park want to get the buzz on some cleanliness concerns, before Stephen from The Crossings Inn asks for answers about some comments that gave him the chills. Accusations fly as payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Doctors fear for a man who has epilepsy after he fell and hit his head on concrete. Things escalate when he has a second seizure and stops breathing. A surfer may never walks again after crashing headfirst into a sandbank, and a doctor who used to be a professional rugby player spots something worrying in a vets x-ray

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Linden, 15, is brought to AandE having badly cut his leg while back-flipping off a shed roof onto a trampoline. As well as calling an ambulance, his friends filmed the accident on their mobile phones and happily show the clip to the staff at Kings. Junior doctor Sammy looks after 88-year-old Panayiota, who has been referred to hospital with breathing difficulties. Originally from Cyprus, the patient speaks very little English and Sammy has to contact a translator to help with the diagnosis and treatment. Meanwhile, 55-year-old lorry driver Antony has lost all feeling in his left leg, and an ultrasound scan reveals he needs emergency surgery on a blocked artery to save his limb

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A young man who has had a severe reaction to a recreational drug is wheeled into resus by paramedics, and senior sister Jen and the medical team face a challenge to calm their patient down so they can treat him. A 65-year-old woman is brought in by her best friends after hitting her head when she fell off a chair while playing bingo, and a 31-year-old man with multiple sclerosis is rushed in after developing a fever at home

programme.title: The Emergency Ward

Jane lovingly restored her spectacular country pile to its former glory, and the breathtaking views prove popular. However, it seems her restoration work doesnt meet everyones standards, as some guests bemoan the patchy paintwork. The breakfast buffet the next morning also results in mixed appraisals

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day sees emotions are running high as the BandBers pore over their assessments. Derwent House Apartments are up first, with the hosts keen to turn up the heat on Jane and Sharons facilities feedback. Gemma and Mark from Burton Constable Holiday Park want to get the buzz on some cleanliness concerns, before Stephen from The Crossings Inn asks for answers about some comments that gave him the chills. Accusations fly as payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Doctors fear for a man who has epilepsy after he fell and hit his head on concrete. Things escalate when he has a second seizure and stops breathing. A surfer may never walks again after crashing headfirst into a sandbank, and a doctor who used to be a professional rugby player spots something worrying in a vets x-ray

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Linden, 15, is brought to AandE having badly cut his leg while back-flipping off a shed roof onto a trampoline. As well as calling an ambulance, his friends filmed the accident on their mobile phones and happily show the clip to the staff at Kings. Junior doctor Sammy looks after 88-year-old Panayiota, who has been referred to hospital with breathing difficulties. Originally from Cyprus, the patient speaks very little English and Sammy has to contact a translator to help with the diagnosis and treatment. Meanwhile, 55-year-old lorry driver Antony has lost all feeling in his left leg, and an ultrasound scan reveals he needs emergency surgery on a blocked artery to save his limb

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Its a busy Mothers Day at south Londons Kings College Hospital as 23-year-old builder Jamie is rushed in by paramedics having fallen from the roof of a three-storey building, landing on a brick wall. The team performs an emergency ultrasound to determine whether he has suffered internal injuries or fractured his ribs and spine, and spot a punctured lung that needs to be reinflated. Four-month-old Weston has been brought to paediatric AandE after suffering from diarrhoea and vomiting for more than 24 hours, while doctors suspect David, 74, has had a stroke. Junior doctor Matt looks after 80-year-old Daphne, who has dislocated her replacement hip

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Oxfordshire, the heli-medics are dispatched to a motocross track where Mike has come off his bike, falling over 10 feet, and is experiencing altered sensations in both legs. In another motorcycle accident, Luke suffers a serious femur fracture and a piece of his bone is lying on the road. Near Kendal, Moon has a tonic-clonic seizure and theres drama on the ambulance journey to hospital

programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin goes house-hunting in and around the attractive Spanish town of Chiclana de la Frontera on the Costa de la Luz, with chauffeur company owner Steve and export co-ordinator Janice. programme.title: France: The Post War Recovery
programme.desc: Part one of two. The summer of 1944 marked the end of dark times for France. Aspiring to a better future, its people rolled up their sleeves and set out about rebuilding the nations industry and agriculture. However, in post Second World War France, hopes and reality soon collided

programme.title: France: The Post War Recovery
programme.desc: Part two of two. From the Liberation of Paris to the Évian Accords signing Algerias independence, via major social crisis of 1947, Abbe Pierres appeal against poverty, the rise of modern comfort or the OAS attacks, this documentary paints a vast picture of a country torn between unity and division in the wake of the Second World War
