programme.title: The War
programme.desc: Examination of the Allied campaign in Italy during early 1944. Unable to break through Nazi lines, troops were stalled in the mountains below Rome during the long winter months and into the spring. Elsewhere too, the invasion was going badly, as the landing at Anzio ended in failure with thousands of soldiers exposed to enemy fire and penned in by German forces

programme.title: The War
programme.sub-title: Pride of Our Nation - June 6 1944: D-Day
programme.desc: Inhabitants of four American towns in Alabama, California, Connecticut and Minnesota recall the events of D-Day, in which more than 150,000 men landed on French soil to take part in the bloodiest conflict in US history since the Civil War

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: The Allies make slow progress through Europe during the summer of 1944, finding themselves bogged down in the Normandy countryside. In the Pacific, American forces on the island of Saipan fight their costliest battle to date, but the mood is buoyed by the eventual Nazi retreat and the liberation of Paris on August 25, ending four years of occupation

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: The plan to end the war in Europe by winter 1944 founders as Allied forces massed on the German border find themselves perilously short of fuel, leading commanders to take a risky gamble and parachute thousands of additional troops behind enemy lines. In the Pacific, General MacArthur heads one of the most brutal campaigns of the conflict while taking the island of Peleliu

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: Examining General MacArthurs campaign to liberate the Philippines and his resultant popularity back home in America - which belied the scale of the bloodshed necessary for victory. The documentary also studies the US Armys losses in late autumn 1944, while trying to force its way through the heavily defended Hurtgen Forest and Vosges Mountains, which lie on Germanys eastern border

programme.desc: Recounting the story of the Rust Belt, running through Pennsylvania, West Virginia, Ohio, Indiana and the lower peninsula of Michigan, ending in Illinois, Iowa and Wisconsin. What was once the hub of the American industrial revolution and innovation fell into decline in the 1970s as competition from abroad, economic crises and automation took their toll. Part one of two

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Wood expert Will Kirk is entrusted with a dearly loved wooden soldiers trunk, which has been passed down five generations of one family. Plus, Dominic Chinea and master saddler Suzie Fletcher pair up to revive a pair of roller skates dating back to the 1890s

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Brenton West and leather expert Suzie Fletcher work their collective magic on an antique camera. programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: After overthrowing her husband and having his successor jailed and eventually murdered, Russian empress Catherine II will stop at nothing to keep her position. She sees her own son as a threat to her and refuses to marry the man who helped her to power for fear he will share the crown. Historical drama following the German-born empress of Russia towards the end of her reign. Starring Helen Mirren and Jason Clarke

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: Potemkin returns and hopes to begin a relationship with Catherine, only to discover she has fallen for Lieutenant Vasilchikov. Meanwhile, Prince Paul becomes increasingly frustrated at the perceived refusal of his succession

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: Catherine struggles to deal with Potemkins moods and jealousy and tragedy strikes for Paul, forcing her to resort to extreme measures

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: In the final episode, Potemkin is forced to fight for Catherine and for Russia once again, and the exertion of war begins to take its toll on their relationship

programme.title: House of the Dragon

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra questions Daemons loyalty as Otto schemes to turn the public against her, while Ser Criston Cole concocts a misguided plan for revenge

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.sub-title: Missouri Mutual Life and Health Insurance Company
programme.desc: Eager to please, Clark ramps up his support for Floyds health and financial wellness, while Carol makes her lover swear to secrecy

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the town of Ennis, Alaska, the eight men working at the Tsalal Arctic Research Station all disappear. Local police chief Liz Danvers leads the investigation, but state trooper Evangeline Navarro believes it may be linked to an unsolved murder. The return of the crime anthology, starring Jodie Foster and Kali Reis

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: While Hank leads the search for Clark, Prior asks Danvers about the murder-suicide case that drove a wedge between her and Navarro. After sifting through the contents of Clarks trailer, Navarro and Danvers seek out a local hairdresser for insight on Annie, which leads to a tip about another former Tsalal worker. Later, tensions grow between Danvers and her stepdaughter Leah

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Danvers and Prior set out to learn more about Tsalal - and find an unlikely location for the physical evidence - Captain Connelly threatens to hand the case over to Anchorage. Later, Navarro and Danvers separately find a connection between one of the Tsalal men and Annie, prompting the former partners to agree to work the case together

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatras regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: Floyd confronts Clark about the affair, while Plumb and Homer uncover new information about Carols past. Black comedy, starring David Harbour, Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini

programme.title: Succession

programme.title: Urban Secrets

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming tours the less-celebrated sights of Brighton, beginning by visiting the Toy and Model Museum to look at its collection of model trains. He then discovers a boutique that sells a variety of unusual items, before taking a glimpse behind the scenes at the Royal Pavilion

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatras regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the citys biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: After scaling back his role in the FBI and still reeling from a family tragedy, Special Agent Tom Brandis reluctantly returns to the field to head a new, relatively inexperienced team to investigate a string of robberies in Philadelphia. Following his brothers death, Robbie Prendergrast earns extra cash for his family by ripping off drug dealers - but a bad tip upends his delicate balance. Crime drama, starring Mark Ruffalo

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: As he prepares for an emotional court appearance, Tom buries himself in the case, while Emily questions her obligations to the family. Maeve makes a critical choice to protect her own loved ones, while Robbie works to find a way to turn his newfound surplus into cash

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.sub-title: When Youre Lost in the Darkness
programme.desc: Twenty years after modern civilisation has been destroyed, a hardened survivor is hired to smuggle a 14-year-old girl out of an oppressive quarantine zone. What starts as a small job soon becomes a brutal, heartbreaking journey, as they both must traverse the US and depend on each other for survival. Starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: After escaping the QZ, Joel and Tess clash over Ellies fate while navigating the ruins of Boston on their way to drop the teenager off with a group of Fireflies

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: When a stranger approaches his compound, survivalist Bill forges an unlikely connection. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey, with Nick Offerman

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Joel and Ellie continue with their journey to Wyoming, but end up drawing the attention of a vindictive rebel leader while driving through Kansas City

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: While attempting to evade the rebels, Joel and Ellie cross paths with the most wanted man in Kansas City. Kathleen continues her hunt

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: After ignoring the advice of locals, Joel and Ellie descend deeper into dangerous territory in search of the Fireflies - and Tommy. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: As Joel fights to survive, Ellie looks back on the night that changed everything. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Ellie crosses paths with a vengeful group of survivors and draws the attention of the leader, while a weakened Joel faces a new threat. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Joel and Ellie near the end of their journey, while a flashback reveals a woman placing her trust in a lifelong friend. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: DTF St Louis

programme.title: I Hate Suzie
programme.desc: As the night of the Dance Crazee Xmas final arrives, Suzie finds herself on the edge of glory and disaster. Comedy drama, starring Billie Piper

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Prior digs into the links between Tsalal and mining company Silver Sky, Navarro rescues Leah from a local protest that has turned violent. At a meeting with Silver Sky executve Kate McKitterick, Danvers balks when Connelly shares the official cause of the Tsalal mens deaths - and gets a warning against pursuing the case any further. Later, Hank receives a quid pro quo offer

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: When Julias mental-health struggles resurface, Navarro takes her to a local facility, promising that this time will be better. Later, Danvers and Navarro confirm the location of Annies murder, while the police chief levies a harsh punishment on Leah following her stepdaughters act of protest

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Hoping to work the angles, Kendall and Roman ask Shiv to invite a campaign insider to Logans pre-election day party. Starring Jeremy Strong, Sarah Snook and Kieran Culkin

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: On election night, Tom tries to manage an increasingly chaotic newsroom, while the Roy siblings spar over the outcome. Starring Jeremy Strong, Sarah Snook and Kieran Culkin

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Amid rising tensions, Shiv tries to reposition herself within a new political landscape, while Kendall rallies supporters. Jeremy Strong, Sarah Snook and Kieran Culkin star

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham hosts its annual Pirate Festival, paying tribute to Devons colourful maritime history, while fisherman Nathan sets off in search of a lucrative catch

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor explores Berlin, visiting the arty Propeller Island City Lodge - a hotel where guests can fulfil their fantasies by sleeping in lion cages, coffins or rotating beds. At the Schlosshotel in affluent Grunewald, cabaret dancer Romy Haag talks to Richard about her affair with David Bowie, who stayed at the hotel while living in the German capital in the 1970s

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. Among his destinations are a 1930s banking building that has remained unaltered since closing in 2007, a well-appointed set of toilets and a recording studio hidden in a bar. He also discovers which former dictator once spent Christmas in the city

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: Island of Lost Dreams (2002)
programme.desc: The pint-sized secret agents investigate a mad scientist who has meddled with powerful forces and created a host of bizarre mutant animals. However, the villain is not the only problem they have to face, as another pair of youngsters are determined to outshine them. Family adventure sequel, starring Antonio Banderas, Steve Buscemi and Carla Gugino

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)
programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. Adventure sequel, starring Daryl Sabara, Alexa Vega, Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas, Ricardo Montalban, George Clooney, Steve Buscemi, Salma Hayek and Elijah Wood

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Mechs vs Mutants (2016)
programme.desc: The Dark Knight battles old enemies who have been transformed into giant monsters. Animated superhero adventure, with the voices of Roger Craig Smith and Oded Fehr

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager picks up a distress signal originating from the middle of the ocean. Joining an expedition to track the signal to its source, he discovers an unexplored island inhabited by strange creatures, and searches for a way to rescue its sole human inhabitant. Fantasy adventure sequel to Journey to the Centre of the Earth, starring Dwayne Johnson, Michael Caine and Josh Hutcherson

programme.title: Bookworm (2024)
programme.desc: Mildred, an 11-year-old girl, finds her world turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, takes her on a wild adventure. Family comedy, starring Elijah Wood and Nell Fisher

programme.title: Men in Black II (2002)
programme.desc: Agent J investigates the unauthorised landing of a spacecraft and discovers a malevolent alien disguised as a lingerie model is on the verge of destroying humanity. His only hope of stopping her diabolical plot is to restore the memory of his retired partner K - but his former mentor takes more than a little convincing. Sci-fi comedy sequel, directed by Barry Sonnenfeld, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Rosario Dawson, Lara Flynn Boyle, Johnny Knoxville, Rip Torn and Tony Shalhoub

programme.title: Men in Black 3 (2012)
programme.desc: An alien criminal escapes from a prison on the moon and goes back in time on a mission of revenge, changing the course of history. Agent J of the top-secret Earth defence organisation follows him back to 1969, and joins forces with a younger version of his mentor Agent K to set things right. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Will Smith, Josh Brolin and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie (2025)
programme.desc: Four misfits are yanked through a strange portal into a cubic realm powered by imagination. To return home, they must learn its rules and journey alongside an unlikely master crafter. Director Jared Hesss blockbusting fantasy adventure based on the hit videogame, starring Jack Black, Jason Momoa, Emma Myers and Jennifer Coolidge

programme.title: Pokemon: Detective Pikachu (2019)
programme.desc: Student Tim Goodman sets out to find his missing detective father by teaming up with a wise-cracking talking Pikachu that his dad, Harry, used to own. With help from reporter Lucy and her Psyduck, they attempt to track him down before time runs out. Fantasy adventure, starring Justice Smith and the voice of Ryan Reynolds, with Kathryn Newton, Ken Watanabe and Bill Nighy

programme.title: E.T.: The Extra-Terrestrial (1982)
programme.desc: A lonely boy befriends an alien who has been left stranded on Earth. The two develop a psychic connection as the boy helps the extraterrestrial to contact his own people and call for rescue. However, living on Earth starts to have a devastating effect on the visitors health, and a government operative is determined to capture him for study. Steven Spielbergs sci-fi fantasy, starring Henry Thomas, Drew Barrymore, Dee Wallace and Peter Coyote

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)

programme.title: Uncharted (2022)
programme.desc: A pair of treasure hunters embark on a globetrotting search for a fortune that was lost 500 years previously, in a race against time against a ruthless rival who claims to be the rightful owner. The quest for fortune and glory sets the younger of the duo on a search for his missing brother. Action adventure, starring Tom Holland, Mark Wahlberg and Antonio Banderas

programme.desc: A teenager picks up a distress signal originating from the middle of the ocean. Joining an expedition to track the signal to its source, he discovers an unexplored island inhabited by strange creatures, and searches for a way to rescue its sole human inhabitant. Fantasy adventure sequel to Journey to the Centre of the Earth, starring Dwayne Johnson, Michael Caine and Josh Hutcherson

programme.title: Men in Black 3 (2012)
programme.desc: An alien criminal escapes from a prison on the moon and goes back in time on a mission of revenge, changing the course of history. Agent J of the top-secret Earth defence organisation follows him back to 1969, and joins forces with a younger version of his mentor Agent K to set things right. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Will Smith, Josh Brolin and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: Island of Lost Dreams (2002)
programme.desc: The pint-sized secret agents investigate a mad scientist who has meddled with powerful forces and created a host of bizarre mutant animals. However, the villain is not the only problem they have to face, as another pair of youngsters are determined to outshine them. Family adventure sequel, starring Antonio Banderas, Steve Buscemi and Carla Gugino

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)
programme.desc: Peter Parker balances life as an ordinary high school student with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, while waiting in vain to join his mentor Iron Man on a world-saving mission. Determined to prove he is ready for bigger challenges, he investigates a spree of crimes committed with advanced weapons - leading him into a battle with a ruthless winged enemy on the hunt for priceless technology. Superhero adventure, starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton and Robert Downey Jr

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: E.T.: The Extra-Terrestrial (1982)
programme.desc: A lonely boy befriends an alien who has been left stranded on Earth. The two develop a psychic connection as the boy helps the extraterrestrial to contact his own people and call for rescue. However, living on Earth starts to have a devastating effect on the visitors health, and a government operative is determined to capture him for study. Steven Spielbergs sci-fi fantasy, starring Henry Thomas, Drew Barrymore, Dee Wallace and Peter Coyote

programme.title: Shrek (2001)
programme.desc: Anti-social ogre Shrek resolves to stop an evil ruler from banishing fairy-tale characters to his swampland home. However, the reluctant hero ends up forced to rescue the beautiful Princess Fiona from a castle guarded by a dragon, aided only by a wisecracking donkey. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, John Lithgow, Cameron Diaz, Eddie Murphy and Vincent Cassel

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Determined to prove he is ready for bigger challenges, he investigates a spree of crimes committed with advanced weapons - leading him into a battle with a ruthless winged enemy on the hunt for priceless technology. Superhero adventure, starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton and Robert Downey Jr

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel.

programme.title: The Golden Compass (2007)
programme.desc: Orphan Lyra Belacqua lives in a parallel universe populated by magical and menacing characters. When her best friend becomes the latest in a long line of children to mysteriously vanish, she embarks on a perilous mission to uncover the dark secret behind their disappearance. Fantasy adventure based on Philip Pullmans novel Northern Lights, starring Dakota Blue Richards, Nicole Kidman, Daniel Craig and Eva Green. Featuring the voices of Ian McKellen, Kristin Scott Thomas and Kathy Bates

programme.title: Batman Forever (1995)
programme.desc: The masked crimefighter takes on the twin threats of disfigured maniac Two-Face and insane genius the Riddler, who are plotting to control the brains of the entire world. Meanwhile, an acrobat whose family has been murdered by Two-Face steps up to join Batman in his fight against evil. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Val Kilmer, Tommy Lee Jones, Nicole Kidman, Jim Carrey and Chris ODonnell

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. Family adventure sequel, starring Antonio Banderas, Steve Buscemi and Carla Gugino

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)
programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. Adventure sequel, starring Daryl Sabara, Alexa Vega, Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas, Ricardo Montalban, George Clooney, Steve Buscemi, Salma Hayek and Elijah Wood

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Man Finds Tape (2025)
programme.desc: After finding mysterious video clips, siblings investigate the strange recordings and uncover a disturbing secret. Horror thriller, starring Kelsey Pribilski and William Magnuson

programme.title: The Cinema List: British Women Directors
programme.desc: Spotlighting trailblazing British women directors, from Mamma Mia! to Promising Young Woman, celebrating female filmmaking talent

programme.title: Super Charlie (2024)
programme.desc: Willies dream of fighting crime with his cop dad is shattered when his baby brother Charlie arrives. And the new family member turns out to have superpowers. Family animation, with the voices of Karen Ardiff and Alex Kelly

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Hostages (2025)
programme.desc: After an explosion at a London hotel, three people are swept up in the chaos. As rumours circulate that the blast was a terrorist attack, their story gathers momentum on social media and across the rolling 24-hour news cycle. Writer/director Jim Owens comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons Oscar-winning action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, an Academy Award-winning Sean Penn, and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.desc: The case of Wolfgang Schmidt, a transgender German serial killer who murdered five women and an infant

programme.title: Motorway Patrol

programme.title: A1: Britains Longest Road
programme.desc: Sprotbrough traffic officers respond to a nine-vehicle pile-up caused by an abandoned car and a family-run team transport tonnes of fireworks up the Great North Road

programme.title: A1: Britains Longest Road
programme.desc: A city centre bus collision leaves a pedestrian fighting for her life, and freezing temperatures turn an A1 slip road into what feels like a skating rink

programme.title: A1: Britains Longest Road
programme.desc: Scottish Police respond to a caravan which has overturned and crashed, and a learner driver has a difficult day on the roads

programme.title: Caught on Dashcam
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-dashboard documentary showcasing outrageous road disasters, captured in video form by drivers in-vehicle dashboard cameras

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: An insight into the work of the police dogs of the West Yorkshire force as they hunt for drugs and track down burglars. Also featured are two of Europes most famous canine detectives, Eddie and Keela - formerly employed by South Yorkshire Police - whose skills have been used in the hunt for Madeleine McCann and the investigation into allegations of child abuse in Jersey. Narrated by Ken Stott

programme.title: How I Caught the Killer
programme.desc: After going missing for a year and a half, many believed 14-year-old Cheyenne had run away from home. However, closer analysis revealed the tragic truth

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.desc: Experts analyse the bodies of two women found in a freezer. Their untimely deaths would be linked to one vicious predator

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A profile of the Rhode Island family man and Sunday school teacher Christopher Hightower, who turned out to be a cold-blooded triple murderer

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The crimes of Angel Maturino Resendiz, known to some as the Railroad Killer, who is thought to have taken the lives of more than 23 victims before his execution in 2006

programme.title: The Murderer and Me
programme.desc: Factual crime stories. Over a 10-day period in 2013, Joanna Dennehy murdered three men in and around Peterborough, and then fled to Hereford, where she went on to stab two dog walkers in an apparent indiscriminate murder attempt. This documentary tells the story of the Home Counties mother of two who became one of Britains most notorious killers

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: When a mother of two was found stabbed to death at her home in Olton, West Midlands, in July 12, 2020, it appeared to be a burglary gone wrong. But evidence soon proved otherwise

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The story of Stuart Campbell, who was convicted of the murder of his 15-year-old niece in 2002, even though her body has never been found

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The story of Trimaan Harry Dhillon, who attacked his ex-girlfriend in a jealous frenzy and committed a brutal murder after a campaign of harassment

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.desc: Investigating the murder of Margaret Gardiner, who vanished from her home in 2004. Her husband claimed she had left him, but inconsistencies in his story raised suspicions

programme.title: Murder Next Door
programme.desc: When a much-loved grandmother is found murdered in her home, suspicion falls on everyone from family to neighbours as police seek to find the killer

programme.title: Who Killed Robert Wone
programme.desc: In 2006, Victor Zaborsky reports that his friend has been stabbed by an intruder. Authorities find Robert Wone dead and start to find holes in Victor and his housemates story. Part one of two

programme.title: Who Killed Robert Wone
programme.desc: The long investigation into DC lawyer Robert Wones 2006 murder continues, with no new leads in sight. Part two of two

programme.title: Murdered at First Sight
programme.desc: The story of 19-year-old Celine Figard, who accepted a ride from a lorry driver, but never made it to her destination. Ten days later, her body was found

programme.desc: The story of Velma Barfield, the first woman to be executed by lethal injection after taking six lives, asking what drove her to commit these callous murders

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: There is trouble for speeding tourists who take a corner way too fast, and also for a man who tries to cheat the registration system when he is caught out by his ex-wife

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: Near Dunedin, a driver claims to be sober despite having thrown up in his car. Also, a minivan ends up on its side and a biker gets schooled on the rules of the road

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Focusing on the work of the City of London police as they tackle crime on the streets of the capital

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Footage of car crime and ways it can be prevented, featuring a suspicious-looking man whos wearing two sets of clothes, and youths who run slap-bang into the arms of the shows cameraman after stealing a car

programme.title: A1: Britains Longest Road
programme.desc: Astronaut Tim Peakes space craft is launched up the A1, a police pursuit of a suspected stolen vehicle leads to arrests and a stranded lorry with a blowout causes problems

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Dominic Littlewood hosts the programme that reveals the innovative methods that police officers and members of the public are using to catch criminals in the act. Including footage of a workman who stole a dumper truck and rampaged through the Norfolk countryside and a thief who took two charity tins for sick children, but made a crucial error

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Dom Littlewood investigates the case of a deaf girl traumatised to find burglars in her home, and an OAP whose carers steal from him, but they get caught out by an ingenious plan

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A burglar trying to steal laptops is caught out, while a Scottish corner shop owner is the victim of an armed robbery, and his daughter fears for his life. With Dominic Littlewood

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Police officers in west Wales deal with violent drunks and drug dealers, as well as a dangerous domestic incident

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A profile of John Duffy and David Mulcahy, who terrorised the south of England in the 1980s with a string of attacks on women and children near railway stations

programme.title: Killer in My Village

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: The tragic story behind the killing of Yvonne McCann, murdered by her husband after a row at home in 2020

programme.title: Macaque Island
programme.desc: The Hill Troop invade the Street Troops turf, before the Sisterhood plots to kidnap Saras baby. Meanwhile, alpha Loci discovers his old rival is back

programme.title: Macaque Island
programme.desc: A brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf, before alpha wannabe Ajit makes his move

programme.title: Wolves and Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: A look at how canids and felines deploy an arsenal of hunting skills. Felines face endurance, while wolves rely on their privileged sense of smell in a fight for survival

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Following his visit to the Great Barrier Reef in 1957, naturalist and broadcaster David Attenborough returns and uses the latest filming techniques to unlock the secrets of the natural wonder. In the first edition, he descends beneath the waves at night and uses cutting-edge technology to generate computer scans of the sea floor. He also learns about a complex community of animals, as well as the annual coral spawning, which is responsible for the great diversity in the reef

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Using the latest technology, the naturalist explores the shark-infested waters of Osprey Reef in the Triton submersible, before returning to the nesting grounds of the Green Sea Turtle, 60 years after his first visit to Raine Island. He also marvels at manta ray cleaning stations on Lady Elliot Island, and tracks dwarf minke whales to discover their surprising reasons for returning, and why the reef is vital for their survival

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The naturalist examines what the next few decades may hold for this remarkable ecosystem, and looks at the work of scientists who are trying to preserve the area and the species that inhabit it, assisted by research vessel the Alucia. He also embarks on an ambitious attempt to dive further into the reef than ever before to witness the resilient coral that live down in the depths and see if they hold answers that may help to overcome challenges that lie ahead, as the impact of humans on the reef continues to take its toll

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the unique abilities of the woodpecker to reveal what makes this bird so special. Narrated by Paul Giamatti

programme.title: Wolves and Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: A look at how canids and felines deploy an arsenal of hunting skills. Felines face endurance, while wolves rely on their privileged sense of smell in a fight for survival

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.sub-title: Secret Life of Bugs and Butterflies
programme.desc: The tropical forests of Australia seem empty and still at first glance, but as this documentary reveals, look closer and they are positively teeming with life

programme.title: Jackass 3 (2010)
programme.desc: Third movie based on the MTV comedy series, in which Johnny Knoxville, Bam Margera, Ryan Dunn and the rest of the fearless team of pranksters embark on even more strange and disturbing stunts, which range from gluing themselves together, enraging dangerous animals and firing an occupied portable toilet from a catapult

programme.title: Stuart Little (1999)
programme.desc: An American couple decide their son needs a brother, and plan to adopt another child - but when they get to the orphanage they are greeted by a charming talking mouse named Stuart, who fits the bill perfectly. However, their jealous cat hatches a plot to get rid of the new arrival. Comedy adventure, starring Geena Davis and Hugh Laurie, with the voice of Michael J Fox

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: A baseball prodigys dreams of sporting stardom are cut short when he gets shot. Once he has recovered from his injuries, he rejoins his team as a rookie recruit at an age when most players are thinking of retiring - only to enjoy an unexpected run of success. Drama, starring Robert Redford, Glenn Close, Kim Basinger, Robert Duvall and Barbara Hershey

programme.title: Bye Bye Birdie (1963)
programme.desc: A songwriter tries to organise a farewell performance for a popular rock n roll singer who is about to be drafted into the US army. The event takes place in a small town, where the writer has to contend with a gaggle of screaming fans and his own domineering mother. Musical, starring Dick Van Dyke, Jesse Pearson, Janet Leigh and Ann-Margret

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber (1994)
programme.desc: Dimwitted Rhode Island limousine driver Lloyd Christmas and his equally vacuous friend Harry Dunne embark on a disaster-fraught cross-country trip to Aspen, where they hope to reunite a briefcase with its female owner. However, the pair are unaware the case contains a $1million ransom they would have been better leaving well alone. Farrelly brothers comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Jeff Daniels, Lauren Holly, Teri Garr and Mike Starr

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd (2003)
programme.desc: The half-witted duo meet for the first time as teenagers and band together to face the perils of high school - and prove they are intelligent enough to leave remedial classes behind. Comedy prequel, starring Eric Christian Olsen, Derek Richardson, Rachel Nichols, Eugene Levy and Mimi Rogers

programme.title: Blades of Glory (2007)
programme.desc: A bad-boy figure skater and his effeminate arch-enemy are banned from the sport after their intense rivalry results in a brawl. However, the pair find a loophole in the regulations allowing them to enter the world championships as the first ever same-sex pair - if they can put aside their differences long enough to compete. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Jon Heder, Will Arnett and Amy Poehler

programme.title: The Hangover (2009)
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part II (2011)
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part III (2013)
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alans brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman

programme.title: The Naked Gun (2025)
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his legendary father, Frank Drebin Jr must save his police department by solving a case. Comedy reboot, starring Liam Neeson, Pamela Anderson and Danny Huston

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad! (1988)
programme.desc: While investigating the shooting of a colleague, disaster-prone police lieutenant Frank Drebin uncovers a plot to assassinate the Queen during her visit to Los Angeles. However, after he is sacked from the force by the mayor, the cop has to operate beneath the radar to get to the bottom of the conspiracy. Comedy, with Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley and Ricardo Montalban

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear (1991)
programme.desc: Blundering cop Frank Drebin discovers a secret conspiracy to kidnap a renowned solar energy expert and replace him with an imposter. As he sets out to bring the perpetrators to justice, he is unexpectedly reunited with an old flame. Slapstick comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, George Kennedy, Richard Griffiths and OJ Simpson.

programme.title: Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult (1994)
programme.desc: Inept police detective Frank Drebin plans to retire from the force, but is lured back by the opportunity to foil a terrorist plot. Going undercover in prison, he sets out to prevent an evil mastermind from escaping and carrying out his fiendish plan - to bomb the Oscar awards ceremony. Comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, OJ Simpson, George Kennedy and Fred Ward

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective (1994)
programme.desc: An eccentric but brilliant former cop sets himself up to champion the underdog - as a private eye specialising in locating missing animals. The zany detective is called in to find a kidnapped dolphin - the mascot of an American football team - and uncovers a plot involving high-level police corruption. Comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Courteney Cox, Sean Young, Tone Loc and Noble Willingham

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber (1994)

programme.desc: A middle-aged married woman feels her long-standing relationship with her unadventurous husband is becoming stale. When she hears of a marriage counsellor offering therapy sessions in his remote retreat, she persuades her reluctant spouse to join her for a week with the doctor rediscovering why they fell in love in the first place. Romantic comedy, with Meryl Streep, Tommy Lee Jones and Steve Carell

programme.title: The Estate (2022)
programme.desc: Two sisters attempt to win over their terminally ill, difficult-to-please aunt in the hope of becoming the beneficiaries of her wealthy estate, only to find the rest of their greedy family members have the same idea. Comedy, starring Toni Collette, Anna Faris, David Duchovny and Kathleen Turner

programme.desc: A host of weird and wacky characters cause mayhem at an exclusive golf club, including a laid-back professional player, an obnoxious millionaire, the snobbish club president, a motley collection of teenage caddies and a psychotic groundskeeper engaging in a fight to the death with a canny gopher. Comedy, starring Chevy Chase, Bill Murray, Michael OKeefe and Rodney Dangerfield

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Dustin and Lauren are captured by a drug dealer in the forest, who is subsequently murdered in a mysterious fashion. However, while Nick visits Monroe to discuss the case, the frustrated brothers of the deceased man kidnap Dustin in a bid to determine who killed their brother

programme.title: Grimm

programme.title: Grimm

programme.title: Grimm

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A woman is struck by a car while suffering terrifying hallucinations. Nick and Hank investigate, and discover a goat-like creature that could be behind a series of recent disappearances

programme.title: Grimm

programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary about American-born Irish statesman and political leader Éamon de Valera, a leader in the 1916 Easter Rising. In 1924, De Valera was stripped of power and in poor mental health in prison. There was a cohort of radical women involved in the 1916 Rising and the War of Independence who supported him. Then the Treaty happened. As suddenly as he had gained power, de Valera was locked out of it. Opposing the Treaty gave these women common ground with De Valera, but who would end up the losers in this political game?

programme.desc: Alan and Philip goad Rigsby into fasting for three days - and it is not long before he is stealing Viennas cat food to stave off the pangs of hunger. With Leonard Rossiter and Richard Beckinsale

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby challenges Philip to a boxing match, convinced Miss Jones will throw herself at his feet if he wins. Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour, Richard Beckinsale and Don Warrington star

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby discovers there is a new man in Miss Joness life and decides to declare his feelings for her - but his romantic gesture comes too late. Classic comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour, Richard Beckinsale and Don Warrington

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: A smooth-talking new tenant called Seymour, whose aristocratic veneer conceals the soul of an out-and-out crook, tries to con Rigsby out of his life savings. Classic comedy, with Leonard Rossiter and Henry McGee

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.sub-title: The Last of the Big Spenders

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.sub-title: Things That Go Bump in the Night

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.sub-title: For the Man Who Has Everything

programme.title: Steptoe and Son
programme.desc: Albert has a win on the premium bonds and sets about transforming himself into a suave man about town, attracting the attention of a conniving gold-digger in the process. June Whitfield guest stars, with Harry H Corbett and Wilfrid Brambell

programme.title: Steptoe and Son
programme.desc: Albert advertises for a lodger, and an outraged Harold moves out. However, his new job does not work out and he has to plead to his father to allow him to return

programme.title: Steptoe and Son

programme.title: Steptoe and Son

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Melissa Rauch

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is racked with guilt when he tries to date Lucy and Emily at the same time, Penny has trouble deciding whether to take a role in a film, and Sheldon struggles to choose between two gaming systems. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tries to help Sheldon when he starts to wonder whether he is wasting his time studying string theory. Meanwhile, during a dinner, Raj discovers Howard once embarrassed himself on a date with Emily. Stephen Hawking guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny and Leonard try to distract Sheldon from his career woes by reinstating Anything Can Happen Thursday, but it causes friction among the gang when Amy and Bernadette are caught lying. Meanwhile, Raj seeks Howards help in preparing for a date with Emily. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gangs preparations for Star Wars Day are interrupted by the news that Professor Proton has died. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with a guest appearance by Bob Newhart

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny gets fired from the movie, prompting her to take a serious look at her life. Raj receives advice from Sheldon after he sees Emily on a date with another man at the cinema, while Howards mother breaks her leg. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon becomes upset about his career, the destruction of the comic-book store and Leonard and Pennys future living arrangements. Elsewhere, Howard is unable to keep hold of a carer for his mother. Comedy, staring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, guest starring Regina King (Southland), with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When Gillian Fletcham reveals a talent scout is heading to Kembleford to find dancers for TV sensation Go Dancing, Mrs Devine and Brenda are delighted. As the showcase nears, Father Brown is shocked at how cut throat the world of competitive dancing is. Gillian dumps her regular dance partner, her brother Derek Fletcham in favour of Italian Stallion Mario Cantoloni, while award-winning couple Pauline Danbury and Robert Danbury find the pressure a strain on their relationship. The very next day, Gillian is found murdered at the dance school. Derek is firmly in the frame, but Father Brown isnt convinced and investigates the dancing rivalries. Fifties-set crime drama, guest starring Kevin Clifton, with Mark Williams

programme.desc: A carpet magnate is killed in an accident at his warehouse, but his youngest daughter suspects foul play and hires Frank and Luella to investigate her own two sisters

programme.desc: An archaeologist is poisoned during a dig, and with only two suspects and a quick confession, it looks like this is going to be an open-and-shut case. Meanwhile, Neville and Florence realise they might get along better than they originally thought, although the DIs attempts to embrace island life do not find favour with the Commissioner

programme.desc: Jen Brister plays host in this show recorded before a packed house at Londons Hammersmith Apollo, warming up the audience and then introducing routines by fellow comedians Esther Manito and Adam Rowe

programme.desc: Comedians Jo Brand and Joe Wilkinson, weather presenter Lucy Martin and journalist Amol Rajan join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the offbeat panel show. As usual, the participants set out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory, through rounds such as Home Truths and Quick-fire Lies

programme.title: Mel Giedroyc: Unforgivable
programme.desc: Mel and Lou are joined by Ross Kemp, Shirley Ballas and Rosie Jones as Shirley divulges her revenge on a cheating husband and Ross spills all on a prison-based prank

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels across the Kalahari desert in southern Africa, one of the continents last great unspoilt wildernesses. He begins his journey in a small village in Namibias Nyae Nyae conservancy, where he sets out on a hunt for wildebeest with San trackers, who still live in the traditional way. After weeks of dusty travel, Simon ends his journey in the Okavango Delta, where seasonal rains turn the desert in to a vast oasis of greenery

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: Sparks are flying in Royston, Hertfordshire, and not just amongst the bidders as the contents of a bin goes up in smoke, and a mystery object under tarp causes a cat-fight. Seans flying skills are put to the test and Nat and John take a gamble on a double unit - but will it pay off?

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: Heavy D, Nat, John, Linda and the rest of the bidders are in Newcastle-upon-Tyne trying to outbid each other. Not everything is black and white in the north-east city, as savvy bidders gamble on unseen storage units. Feisty new girl Ione clashes with Shaun. Sean Kelly hosts

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Customs and Border Protection officers are stunned when they discover more than $2million of cocaine mixed in with gallons of household paint and bottles of beer

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Vigilant Customs and Border Protection officers uncover 5,000 rounds of ammunition being smuggled across Hidalgo Bridge into Mexico

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson tests the Ford Focus RS, Richard Hammond goes off-road in the Subaru Forester, and Jason Dawe provides a guide to buying a used BMW M3. Jamiroquai singer and car enthusiast Jay Kay joins the team in the Top Gear base and an unusual challenge involving motorbikes and a bus is attempted

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team cast their eyes over the best-looking cars in the world, with Jeremy Clarkson testing the Aston Martin DB7, Jason Dawe checking out a second-hand Mercedes E320 cabriolet and Peugeot 406 coupe, and Richard Hammond examining the Citroen DS. Plus, two industry insiders give an insight into the future of car design. Actor Ross Kemp is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer go fishing for crucian carp in Wiltshire, a notoriously elusive fish that is usually only sighted at either dusk or dawn. They spend the night in a deconsecrated church, where Paul shares a new song that he is working on, while Bob brings a new fishing chair to the river that Paul does not approve of

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer fish for chub on the river Wye in Herefordshire, Bob making an unexpected arrival by rowing boat. They are joined on todays trip by Dr Anand Patel from the Centre for Mens Health for a discussion of medical matters, and spend the night in a converted dovecote in the idyllic grounds of a 700-year-old manor house

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate quality produce that needs to be cooked with the respect it deserves, as they continue their culinary journey through time. The duo argue that, while convenience food serves a purpose, only the best ingredients and perfect cooking can produce something truly delicious

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the nations love affair with beer and cider, revealing how at one time it was safer to drink ale than water. The duo are also given a chance to gain hands-on brewing experience at a cider festival

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Former Britains Got Talent winner Lee Ridley, aka Lost Voice Guy, is Robsons guest on a trip to Weardale and Co Durham to explore ways of spending time in the outdoors. Lee takes Robson to a favourite spot he used to walk as a child near his Consett home, before the pair take to the water at Derwent Reservoir as they investigate the stress-relieving benefits of sailing

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels across the Kalahari desert in southern Africa, one of the continents last great unspoilt wildernesses. He begins his journey in a small village in Namibias Nyae Nyae conservancy, where he sets out on a hunt for wildebeest with San trackers, who still live in the traditional way. After weeks of dusty travel, Simon ends his journey in the Okavango Delta, where seasonal rains turn the desert in to a vast oasis of greenery

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The explorer travels the length of North and South America. The expedition begins at the northernmost point in Alaska, journeying south through Canada to the border with the US. In Denali National Park, he witnesses first hand the impact of climate change on a glacier. He also hunts caribou with native Americans, hears from both sides of the conflict over a controversial oil drilling plan, and discovers Vancouvers opioid addiction crisis

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: Counter Terrorism Policing foil an Islamist terror plot, and the CPS Special Crime Unit bring those responsible for a fatal crash on the M62 to justice

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: Manchester police take down a gang of teen car thieves, and the Serious Fraud Office unravels a 400-million-pound global fraud in the steel industry

programme.desc: The chefs gastronomic road trip brings him to northern Greece where he enjoys traditional dishes including veal stiffado and kotopita - which Rick declares to be the best chicken pie he has ever tasted. In the coastal city of Preveza he goes out prawn fishing and follows in the footsteps of poet Lord Byron visiting Messolonghi, a city where seafood is a highly regarded commodity. Rick also rolls up his own sleeves to cook his favourite Greek dishes of stuffed peppers and tomatoes and souvlaki

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels across the Kalahari desert in southern Africa, one of the continents last great unspoilt wildernesses. He begins his journey in a small village in Namibias Nyae Nyae conservancy, where he sets out on a hunt for wildebeest with San trackers, who still live in the traditional way. After weeks of dusty travel, Simon ends his journey in the Okavango Delta, where seasonal rains turn the desert in to a vast oasis of greenery

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Customs and Border Protection officers are stunned when they discover more than $2million of cocaine mixed in with gallons of household paint and bottles of beer

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Vigilant Customs and Border Protection officers uncover 5,000 rounds of ammunition being smuggled across Hidalgo Bridge into Mexico

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team cast their eyes over the best-looking cars in the world, with Jeremy Clarkson testing the Aston Martin DB7, Jason Dawe checking out a second-hand Mercedes E320 cabriolet and Peugeot 406 coupe, and Richard Hammond examining the Citroen DS. Plus, two industry insiders give an insight into the future of car design. Actor Ross Kemp is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer go fishing for crucian carp in Wiltshire, a notoriously elusive fish that is usually only sighted at either dusk or dawn. They spend the night in a deconsecrated church, where Paul shares a new song that he is working on, while Bob brings a new fishing chair to the river that Paul does not approve of

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing

They are joined on todays trip by Dr Anand Patel from the Centre for Mens Health for a discussion of medical matters, and spend the night in a converted dovecote in the idyllic grounds of a 700-year-old manor house

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate quality produce that needs to be cooked with the respect it deserves, as they continue their culinary journey through time. programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the nations love affair with beer and cider, revealing how at one time it was safer to drink ale than water. The duo are also given a chance to gain hands-on brewing experience at a cider festival

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes

Lee takes Robson to a favourite spot he used to walk as a child near his Consett home, before the pair take to the water at Derwent Reservoir as they investigate the stress-relieving benefits of sailing

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve

programme.desc: Sister Boniface is called by DI Gillespie to the home of minister of defence Charles Streatham, where guest Mary Sparkes has been found dead at the bottom of a staircase. programme.title: Call the Midwife

Barbara is distraught when she discovers that her father has accepted a missionary posting in New Guinea for the next three years so will not be able to officiate at her wedding, while Violet suffers terribly with hot flushes, Christopher asks Trixie to meet his daughter, and Delias heartache may finally be over

programme.title: Catherine Cooksons The Wingless Bird
programme.desc: Feature-length melodrama set in 1913, about the romantic relationship between Agnes Conway, whose parents own a sweetshop, and Charles Farrier, son of an altogether grander family. Agnes faces an added dilemma when she finds her heart divided between Charles and his soldier brother Reginald. Starring Claire Skinner and Edward Atterton

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Sean Bean returns as Bernard Cornwells swashbuckling hero in a feature-length story. As Sharpe and Harper journey across India in 1818 with the beautiful Marie-Angelique Bonnet, they come across a ragtag army unit supervising the transport of a suspected murderer. However, when the group is attacked by a bandit, Sharpe must get everyone safely to the next garrison - little suspecting he has stumbled across an opium-trafficking ring. Daragh OMalley and Beatrice Rosen also star

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Sister Boniface is called to examine the body of Hilary Sympson-Smythe, who has died mysteriously, her face covered in cold cream and a completed jigsaw with one piece missing. A lonely hearts connection to Ruth Pennys newspaper leads Gillespie and Livingstone to investigate the male respondents. Ruth believes there is another victim who died in identical circumstances

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: An ex-convict is found murdered in his home and suspicion immediately lands on a recently released child killer. Nikki and the Lyell team are introduced to forensic psychologist Sasha Blackburn, who works closely with those released from prison on licence, as both the victim and one of the suspects are clients of hers. The investigators soon learn that it is not just the minds of these young men that are fragile, but their freedom is too. Feature-length episode of the crime drama, guest starring Lyndsey Marshal and Niamh Cusack

Drama, guest starring Eric Sykes, Lindsey Coulson and Victor McGuire

programme.title: Expedition Volcano
programme.desc: Documentary following scientists studying some of the worlds most dangerous active volcanos in the Democratic Republic of Congo. However, it lies in a region troubled by war and humanitarian crises, which has made study of the volcano difficult. Former Royal Marine Aldo Kane is given the task of ensuring the teams safety

programme.title: Expedition Volcano
programme.desc: Documentary following scientists studying some of the worlds most dangerous active volcanos in the Democratic Republic of Congo. The first of two films explores Nyiragongo, which has erupted twice in the past 50 years, most recently in 2002, when it devastated the nearby city of Goma. However, it lies in a region troubled by war and humanitarian crises, which has made study of the volcano difficult. Former Royal Marine Aldo Kane is given the task of ensuring the teams safety

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Vintage comedy from Messrs Barker and Corbett, including a Party sketch and An Appeal on Behalf of the Indecisive

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of the island of Borneo is a lost world of mountains, jungles and ravines which hide a vast abundance of wildlife. Here a team of scientists, climbers and wildlife film-makers gather to explore this extraordinary habitat before it is too late, as felling the rainforest for tropical timber and converting the land to oil palm plantations threaten this extraordinary ecosystem

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: One team searches for elephants, but the unforgiving parasites and leeches of the jungle begin to take their toll. Elsewhere, the mountaineers become lost on a remote peak

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: The team continues its exploration of Borneo, an expedition aimed at tracking down and filming the animals that live there. The adventurers go in search of wild orang-utan and experience a close encounter with a giant python, and one team member is bitten by a coral snake

programme.title: Expedition Volcano
programme.desc: Part two of two. The team takes a helicopter to the crater of an active volcano in the Democratic Republic of Congo that has rarely been studied. The mountain is surrounded by forests, which provide cover for armed militant groups, and the scientists will only have a few short hours to gather information. They then move on to the surrounding area, a dangerous landscape marked by craters from past eruptions

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A funeral for a pet bird inspires Geraldine to transform the church into an ark and hold a special service for the animals of the village - but David is far from impressed by her stunt. Comedy, starring Dawn French and Gary Waldhorn

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Dodgy dealer Del gets his hands on a consignment of self-inflating rubber dolls, which turn out to be filled with explosive gas. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Dels beloved mum apparently makes contact during a seance at the Nags Head, inspiring him to visit the doctor to seek treatment for stomach cramps. Admitted to hospital for tests, he fears there is something seriously wrong with him - but a bacon sandwich and an alcoholic drink smuggled in by Rodney soon put the smile back on his face. Comedy, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: A retired jeweller offers Del-Boy the deal of a lifetime - then suddenly has a heart attack and gets taken to hospital with a briefcase containing 250 cut-price gold necklaces still chained to his wrist. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del enters one of Rodneys old paintings in a competition and is over the moon when he wins a holiday for three at a five-star hotel in Majorca. Soon after, the Trotter brothers and Cassandra arrive at Palma Airport - but Del-Boy reveals there is a slight snag. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Gwyneth Strong

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: First episode of Richard Curtiss comedy, starring Dawn French as the new vicar of a sleepy English village. Her arrival causes consternation among the locals - particularly stuffy councillor David Horton, who vows to have her ejected at all costs. Gary Waldhorn, James Fleet and Emma Chambers co-star

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: The Songs of Praise crew visits Dibley to record a programme in the village church. However, when Geraldine develops a crush on the producer her wayward emotions threaten to plunge the proceedings into disaster. Comedy, guest starring Peter Capaldi (The Thick of It)

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Geraldine is keen to find a celebrity to open the autumn fair in style - and Alice inadvertently comes up with the ideal candidate by letting slip she is related to one Reg Dwight - AKA Elton John. Comedy, starring Dawn French, and Emma Chambers with a guest appearance by Kylie Minogue. First shown in 1994

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A violent storm destroys St Barnabass stained glass window, and Geraldine is put in charge of raising funds to replace it - but the others are unsure whether any of her outlandish ideas will actually work. Comedy, starring Dawn French, Gary Waldhorn, James Fleet, Emma Chambers and Liz Smith

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Gavin starts his job in Cardiff and, while Stacey is thrilled to be back in Wales, Smithy has to come to terms with living in Essex without his best friend. programme.desc: Geraldine is keen to find a celebrity to open the autumn fair in style - and Alice inadvertently comes up with the ideal candidate by letting slip she is related to one Reg Dwight - AKA Elton John. Comedy, starring Dawn French, and Emma Chambers with a guest appearance by Kylie Minogue. First shown in 1994

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A violent storm destroys St Barnabass stained glass window, and Geraldine is put in charge of raising funds to replace it - but the others are unsure whether any of her outlandish ideas will actually work. Comedy, starring Dawn French, Gary Waldhorn, James Fleet, Emma Chambers and Liz Smith

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Local election fever hits the village and Geraldine finds she is a more popular candidate with the voters than over-confident parish council chairman David. Richard Curtiss comedy, starring Dawn French and Gary Waldhorn

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A funeral for a pet bird inspires Geraldine to transform the church into an ark and hold a special service for the animals of the village - but David is far from impressed by her stunt. Comedy, starring Dawn French and Gary Waldhorn

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: First episode of Richard Curtiss comedy, starring Dawn French as the new vicar of a sleepy English village. programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del-Boy becomes a yuppie, complete with red braces, Filofax and chrome briefcase. Meanwhile, Rodney begins attending a computer course at night school, where he meets Cassandra. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Dodgy dealer Del gets his hands on a consignment of self-inflating rubber dolls, which turn out to be filled with explosive gas. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: A retired jeweller offers Del-Boy the deal of a lifetime - then suddenly has a heart attack and gets taken to hospital with a briefcase containing 250 cut-price gold necklaces still chained to his wrist. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del enters one of Rodneys old paintings in a competition and is over the moon when he wins a holiday for three at a five-star hotel in Majorca. Soon after, the Trotter brothers and Cassandra arrive at Palma Airport - but Del-Boy reveals there is a slight snag. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Gwyneth Strong

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Dels beloved mum apparently makes contact during a seance at the Nags Head, inspiring him to visit the doctor to seek treatment for stomach cramps. Admitted to hospital for tests, he fears there is something seriously wrong with him - but a bacon sandwich and an alcoholic drink smuggled in by Rodney soon put the smile back on his face. Comedy, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Rodney ties the knot with Cassandra, but Del has more on his mind than best man duties as the dreaded Driscoll brothers arrive at the Nags Head baying for his blood over some stolen mobile phones. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Gwyneth Strong

programme.title: Dads Army

programme.desc: The Shipmans drive to Wales for the wedding fayre, and after a momentous trip to the church for the reading of the banns, Nessa tells Stacey her big secret. Comedy, starring Mathew Horne and Joanna Page

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Gavin starts his job in Cardiff and, while Stacey is thrilled to be back in Wales, Smithy has to come to terms with living in Essex without his best friend. programme.desc: Marlene allows Boycie to buy a maximum of six cows for the farm - and is less than impressed when Elgin, Jed and Bryan turn up with a herd of 300. programme.sub-title: Come In, Your Time Is Up
programme.desc: The platoon attempts to bring ashore three German airmen who have bailed out and landed in a lake and intend to stay in their dinghy until nightfall. Classic comedy first shown in 1975, starring Arthur Lowe and Ian Lavender

programme.sub-title: Diamonds Are a Mans Best Friend
programme.desc: A wealthy customer loses a valuable diamond in the store and offers a reward for its return. Shop-floor comedy, starring Trevor Bannister, John Inman and Frank Thornton

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Smithy accompanies Nessa to the hospital for her first ultrasound scan, and the pair catch a glimpse of their baby. programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
