programme.title: Harry Enfield and Chums
programme.desc: More expertly crafted comedy sketches from Harry Enfield and colleagues-in-mirth Paul Whitehouse and Kathy Burke, featuring the Camp Jockeys, the Scousers and Kevin the teenager

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Smithy accompanies Nessa to the hospital for her first ultrasound scan, and the pair catch a glimpse of their baby. Stacey becomes unusually excited at the prospect of a weekend visit to her family home after she struggles to adjust to her role as an Essex wife - which proves to lack some of the glamour she had expected

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Dave is unhappy about Nessas plans to let Smithy see the baby, while Stacey ensures Gavin sticks to his promise as she tries to find a new job. Meanwhile, Dawn and Pete join Pam and Mick for a beer and curry night. Comedy, starring Joanna Page and Mathew Horne

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary agrees to see a relationship counsellor, while Tonys efforts to impress Deborahs mother end in disaster. To compound their woes, the duo fear the arrival of Dorothys 10-year-old nephew will ruin their efforts to act maturely. Comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Leslie Ash and Caroline Quentin

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Jeffrey decides Radio Maplin needs a new voice and Spike is seduced by a femme fatale. Classic comedy, starring Jeffrey Holland, Simon Cadell and Su Pollard

programme.title: Wagspiracy: Vardy v Rooney
programme.desc: With access to key individuals who didnt give evidence at the trial, this documentary explores the hidden workings of the tabloids, PRs and agents connected to so-called Wagatha Christie, which followed accuisations between footballers wives Coleen Rooney and Rebekah Vardy. Contributors include Colin Paterson and Lizzie Cundy

programme.title: Louis Therouxs LA Stories
programme.desc: California has some of the toughest regulations controlling sex offenders anywhere in America - after leaving prison they can spend years on parole being tagged and tracked and a lifetime on an online register. In his final film exploring different aspects of life in Los Angeles, Louis Theroux visits hostels to talk to parolees as well as the people charged with monitoring them, and asks whether the restrictions keep society safer and when, if ever, it is right to give sex offenders a second chance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Crews from the West Midlands attend a diabetic who has collapsed at home, reassure the wife of a man with heart problems and keep up the spirits of a woman with womb cancer

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Abi tries to cook a meal for her future mother-in-law and discovers she is not prepared to give up Roger without a fight. Ben looks forward to a visit from an old college pal, only to find out Charlie is not the man he used to be. Comedy, starring Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Roger and Abis wedding day arrives, but the event does not go off without a glitch. Ben dispenses advice on what makes a happy marriage, leaving the bride with serious doubts in her mind, while Janey is dumped by her latest boyfriend and turns up at the church already inebriated

programme.title: My Family
programme.sub-title: Breaking Up Aint Hard to Do
programme.desc: Susan learns two of her old friends are having marital problems, and in an effort to help invites them round for dinner. However, a blazing row soon escalates between the troubled couple - which in turn causes friction in the Harpers own marriage

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Susans severe mood swings lead Michael to believe she is going through the menopause, and his suspicions are only confirmed when she is arrested for stealing a pair of sunglasses. Ben learns the cost of lawyers and decides to represent her in court, but his line of defence proves weak

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Ben falls in love with his neighbours plasma-screen TV when he takes delivery of it for them. Meanwhile, Michaels current flame may be expecting a smaller but more problematic delivery. Domestic comedy, starring Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker as harassed parents

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Bens attempt to pay money into his bank is thwarted when someone else tries to make a withdrawal - with the aid of sawn-off shotguns. Things look bleak for the hostages when he decides to act as a negotiator. Robert Lindsay stars, with a guest appearance by Pauline Quirke

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A 10-month-old puppy called Albie is knocked over by a car on a family camping holiday is rushed in as an emergency admission, and Noel Fitzpatrick fears this may be a life or death situation. Elsewhere, a Scottish terrier has a mysterious ailment, and a 16-month-old spaniel, is suffering from severe arthritis affecting both hips

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick faces one of his greatest practical and ethical challenges yet when hes introduced to Hermes, a tortoise with only one good leg. Can he provide Hermes with three prosthetic feet, using tiny titanium implants? Meanwhile, a rottweiler called Dave urgently needs an upgrade to his previous hip replacements

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A small cavachon is rushed to see Professor Noel Fitzpatrick after being hit by a car. She has a broken leg, but also a serious heart condition. Meanwhile, Simba, a one-year-old Labrador needs help with her badly formed hips, and Tulee the nervous basset hound has diseased discs in her back that leave her in constant pain

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick offers cutting-edge treatment for Luca, a long-suffering four-year-old springer spaniel with a painful elbow disease. He designs and creates a special screw for Lucas leg with a system for injecting a bone-growth gel around it, and after an eight-year-old Newfoundland collapses, its owners face an agonising wait for the MRI scans to reveal if anything can be done for the gentle giant

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Rescue Labrador Tom needs work with a serious wound on one of his front paws, and four-year-old French bulldog called Otis has suffered an accident while being chased by another dog. Professor Noel Fitzpatrick diagnoses a spinal problem high up in Otiss neck that requires surgery. Meanwhile, Bailey, a 10-year-old cocker spaniel, has quite a lot of pain in one of his hind limbs, but his owner wants to avoid surgery, and Noel needs to perform specialist imaging before he can offer any solutions

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews deal with a cycling accident and a woman having a suspected heart attack, while paramedics go above and beyond to get a 24-year-old with allergies the medication she need

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics in Portsmouth attend a man with a mechanical heart valve and a dangerously fast pulse, while in Oxford, crews treat a student having an asthma attack

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
programme.desc: An eight-year-old is having an operation to straighten his squint, a man needs an ultrasound to confirm whether he has cancer and a new mum is having her wisdom teeth removed

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
programme.desc: A 15-year-old has four baby teeth that have not fallen out and need removing, a man is having his urethra widened so that a camera can pass into his bladder to check his cancer has not returned and a woman needs an operation to stop her persistent nose bleeds

programme.title: The Young Midwives of Essex
programme.desc: Its make or break for student midwives Ruby and Grace as they prepare for crucial exams. Mary is still finding her feet on the busy maternity ward

programme.title: Bad Girls Behind Bars
programme.desc: Suspected of being in a romantic relationship, Lo and Kayla are still being kept apart by officers - and Lo has a difficult decision to make. When jail veterans Jackie and Kourtney are moved, they bring with them all the latest news. Detox over, heroin addict Natasha is moved into the jails general population. Used to living with her mother, how she will cope when thrown into an eight-person tank remains to be seen

programme.title: Bad Girls Behind Bars
programme.desc: The segregation pod of Western Massachusetts Regional Womens Correctional Centre houses the most violent inmates. When one of them attacks an officer, it takes all available staff to restrain her, and Sergeant Clayton begins an investigation into the reasons for the assault. Two prisoners who have been separated conduct a secret relationship, and a Satanist struggles to practice her religion behind bars

programme.desc: Its make or break for student midwives Ruby and Grace as they prepare for crucial exams. Mary is still finding her feet on the busy maternity ward

programme.title: The Young Midwives of Essex
programme.sub-title: With Great Power Comes Great Responsibility
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Tacha and Lilli must make decisions about their futures. The young midwives enjoy a spa day

programme.title: Bad Girls Behind Bars
programme.desc: The longest-serving inmate in Western Massachusetts Regional Womens Correctional Centre faces another 11 years in prison for manslaughter, and struggles to come to terms with what she has done. A stripper convicted of ID fraud who gave birth in prison tries to turn her life around with a training programme, and a violent prisoner is being moved out of segregation and into a shared tank with seven others

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: Theres heartbreak and jubilation as Alex meets two couples desperately trying to defy the odds and become parents

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: In this emotional final episode, Alex comes to the end of her training at Kings and three couples await their results. Will they finally become parents?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Gemma and Gorka: Life Behind the Lens
programme.desc: With Gemmas maternity leave coming to an end and Gorka about to head out on tour, its time to pack in as much family fun as possible

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Dartford to meet Scott and Jenny, whose third son Charlie was born with cerebral palsy and developmental delay. The boy needs round-the-clock care, which his mother gave up work to provide, but now he is 13, the family are struggling to cope in their small home. Having heard of their plight, the DIY SOS team turns up to transform their end terrace, backed up by an army of local tradespeople, with designer Naomi Cleaver on hand to ensure they dont stray too far from her vision

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and his crack team of builders, plasterers and electricians come to the aid of Frank and Christine Burrows in Wigan, Greater Manchester. In 2012, the Burrows 35-year-old son Mark retrained as a scaffolder to follow in his fathers footsteps, but was paralysed as the result of an unprovoked attack that left him with severe brain damage. Mark now needs constant care, but the Burrows family home is not yet fit for purpose, so Frank and Christine have been forced to take their son to a care home 15 miles away. With the help of flamboyant designer Laurence Llewelyn Bowen, Nicks experts set about constructing a self-contained apartment alongside the Burrows two-bedroom bungalow, which will provide Mark with the space, independence and security he will need to return home for good after spending two years away

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek has a three-hour drive in a 1960s bus that arrived in the UK after a life in the sun. Dave takes a Triumph TR7 convertible to auction

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Daves on his way to Grimsby to pick up an iconic 80s fast Ford, the Mk1 Fiesta XR2, while Bubbles regrets sitting in an immaculate Morris 1800 which hes now desperate to bid on

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek gets a tour of Hadlow Castle in Kent when he arrives to collect the owners pre-war Alvis and an immaculate Citroen used by the Gestapo in occupied France

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Following the route of the old Caledonian Railway Company, Michael Portillo discovers the Riviera of the Highlands. With a daily direct train service to Kings Cross, Gleneagles remains a top destination and is also headquarters for the British School of Falconry. Berry Town, aka Blairgowrie, is Michaels next stop. At the home of the Scottish raspberry industry, which once sent fruit to London daily on board a raspberry special service from Cooper Angus station, Michael learns how to pick this most delicate of berries. The last stop on this leg is the city of Dundee, where he visits publisher DC Thomson

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his railway journey from Newcastle to Loch Ness, steered by his 1930s Bradshaws Guide. Stopping at Dundee, Michael heads for Glamis Castle, where Lady Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon, the Queen Mother, grew up. Michael hears about her happy childhood and how she later found sanctuary there, when King Edward VIII abdicated and she and Prince Albert unexpectedly became king and queen of the United Kingdom

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo is at Elgins port, the coastal town of Lossiemouth, where the Labour Partys first prime minister James Ramsay MacDonald was born. Nearby, Michael finds a remote boarding school established in the 1930s and famous today both for its unusual ideas and its royal former pupils. His penultimate stop is Inverness, where he uncovers the work of female photographer MEM Donaldson, who documented a Highland way of life that was rapidly disappearing. Michaels journey ends at Loch Ness, where he joins a Deep Scan research team scouring the deep for signs of the elusive monster

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores the West Country between the wars, setting off from the Cornish seaside resort of St Ives and ending his first in the former mining village of St Day. He visits Britains first studio pottery, where he attempts a decorative wax technique and feels the heat of the firing kiln. Michael also joins a family on holiday in a railway carriage called Harvey

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Jack has his eye on a Peugeot 205 GTI that could be one of the finest examples in the country. Plus, Derek collects a pair of sporty 60s Triumphs

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming sets out on the last leg of his journey across central England. While crossing an epic aqueduct near Stratford-upon-Avon, the narrowboat enthusiast gets stuck in a lock in the heart of Birmingham. First broadcast 9 December 2020

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Narrowboater Robbie Cumming begins a 170-mile journey across the north of England. However, he soon runs into difficulty when he encounters a propeller problem in Wigan and runs aground in Blackburn. Nevertheless, he pushes on to navigate a true wonder of the waterways, the Burnley Embankment

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Narrowboater and film-maker Robbie Cumming crosses the Pennines on the picturesque Leeds and Liverpool Canal, and lends a hand to hire boaters in Gargrave, North Yorkshire. He also encounters Bingley Five Rise Locks, a wonder of the inland waterways

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Narrowboater Robbie Cumming explores the Victorian vWest Yorkshire village of Saltaire on the Leeds and Liverpool Canal. He also moors up in Leeds and goes in search of an abandoned waterway on the Aire and Calder Navigation

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming explores the English canal network, beginning with a journey from Shardlow to Etruria Junction, Stoke on Trent, exploring the Trent and Mersey Canal. However, not everything goes to plan, and he will have to deal with a tricky issue with his propeller as well as navigating the complicated locks on the Trent and Mersey Canal

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming explores life on the English canal network. A low canal tunnel in Staffordshire proves to be problematic and Robbie helps out a stranded boater

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cummings exploration of the English canal network continues across the Pennines from Marple to Huddersfield, where his journey is hampered by a fallen tree and a leaking lock pound

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming travels along the Rochdale Canal from Sowerby Bridge to Manchester. But disaster strikes when he runs aground, threatening to stop him from reaching his final destination

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: The presenter travels 1,500 miles to the San Juan Islands in Washington State, just off Americas North West Pacific coast, on the border with Canada. There are more than 100 islands, mostly uninhabited. From the San Juan Islands, Martin travels down Americas West coast to visit the Channel Islands National Park, which is known as Americas Galapagos because of its unique wildlife. Later, Martin takes a 2,000-mile journey across the States to Louisiana, where he visits Avery Island and Delacroix Island

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: The actor visits Puerto Rico, Americas third largest island, and the only one where Spanish is the main language. In 2017, Hurricane Maria ripped through the region, causing the worst disaster in its history. One year on, Martin sees how the locals have begun to recover from the disaster. Later, he travels north to the Sea Islands along the coast of Georgia and the Carolinas, explores part of the 200-mile string of barrier islands of the Outer Banks, and visits Chincoteague island for the annual pony swim

programme.title: Sacred Rivers with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer travels along the Ganges to explore how Indias booming economy has affected its religious culture, starting his journey at the source of the river in the foothills of the Himalayas and following it to where it empties out into the Bay of Bengal. Along the way, he meets westerners in Rishikesh seeking spiritual enlightenment, takes a dip in the fast-flowing waters at Haridwar and discovers how the river is being severely polluted in Kanpur, where it is alleged that cows are secretly being slaughtered to fuel a booming leather trade

programme.title: Sacred Rivers with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer travels to China for a trip along the Yangtze, Asias longest river and the third longest in the world. He follows the route to Dazu, where he sees 50,000 ancient rock carvings, some of the only religious artefacts not to have been destroyed under communist rule. He then takes a river cruise to the Three Gorges Dam - the biggest power station on the planet - before ending his journey in Shanghai, a shining symbol of Chinas new economic might and a city where many are rediscovering religious faith

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming sets out on the last leg of his journey across central England. While crossing an epic aqueduct near Stratford-upon-Avon, the narrowboat enthusiast gets stuck in a lock in the heart of Birmingham. First broadcast 9 December 2020

programme.desc: Narrowboater Robbie Cumming explores the Victorian vWest Yorkshire village of Saltaire on the Leeds and Liverpool Canal. He also moors up in Leeds and goes in search of an abandoned waterway on the Aire and Calder Navigation

programme.desc: Dom Chinea builds a drift car with engineer Sam Lovegrove. At home, he gets a digger in to make his new pond, and he and Sam have a go at gig rowing after fixing the club trailer in Hayle

programme.title: Allo Allo!
programme.desc: Michelle takes advantage of the fact that the Germans think Rene is dead, planning for him to go to England to help the British win the war

programme.title: Allo Allo!
programme.desc: As Michelle makes arrangements to send a microfilm to England by homing pigeon, Herr Flick captures Yvette and Mimi in order to gain access to the cafe to search for the painting of the Fallen Madonna. programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul is picking up a stunning 1961 Vauxhall Cresta, inspired by American design, the car changed the face of British motoring

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave travels to Bedale to extract a barn find - a 1984 Manta GTE which hasnt seen the light of day in thirty years

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programme.desc: Teresa throws a party that instantly becomes drama-filled when an unsettling video leaks about Luis. Margaret reveals a shocking secret about Jennifer to the ladies

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Marcos notices the competition unfolding between the junior stews and he alerts Daisy. and Tom gets some devastating news from home

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Demanding charter guests continue to keep the crew on their toes, and chef Marcos remains determined to impress them

programme.title: UEFA Man in the Middle
programme.desc: Set during the Group Stage of the 2019/20 UEFA Champions League season, episode two takes a deeper dive into the psychology of refereeing

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene host this quiz contest, in which five contestants race in moving podiums across the studio floor to try and win £5,000. The contenders battle across a series of fast-paced qualifiers and head-to-head races where the aim of the game is simple - to make it to the finish line before their rivals. The winner then races against the track itself in an attempt to win the cash prize

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: Tommy Martin interviews the former Republic of Ireland footballer, who reflects on a career that began in the League of Ireland, and saw him move to the top of the English game

programme.title: Filthy House Swap
programme.desc: Two families swap homes in this one-off social experiment, as they discover whether taking on another persons messy house can help them get to grips with their own grime

programme.title: Paul OGrady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: The dog-loving funnyman pays another visit to Battersea, where he falls for the toothless boxer Prince. The pair hit it off immediately, leaving Paul to wonder whether he should rehome the canine himself. But there is bad news - Prince has a suspicious lump on his leg that requires urgent attention. Paul also meets Yorkshire terrier Dash, whose bark has lost its bite leaving him with a very unusual, squeaky voice. As if that were not bad enough, the little canine soon earns the nickname Dash the Slash after the comedian takes him out for a walk - and ends up with a wet leg

programme.title: Paul OGrady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: Paul meets Happi, a Nepalese mountain dog - a breed never featured on the show before - who is a lover of vegetarian food, putting the funnymans culinary skills to the test as he prepares the poochs dinner. He also befriends Rumble the greyhound, who has an unusual problem - he is so happy, his tail has become damaged with all the wagging it does. Finally, Paul hears the story of Parsnip and Carrot, both suspected victims of backstreet breeding. Parsnip in particular is in a bad way, with infected mammary glands as a result of a recent pregnancy

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes at the Royal v Ashfordly General rugby match, as Cheriton dives to score a try, only to be pounced on by opponents. It soon emerges that his injuries are serious, and Ormerod rushes to help his colleague - but his efforts prove futile and Cheriton dies at the scene. Meanwhile, Alun is involved in a road accident caused by a man who recently suffered a stroke, and student nurse Samantha Beaumont fails to impress Matron and Sister Brigid by putting pink sheets on the wards beds. Medical drama, starring Julian Ovenden, Robert Daws, Andy Wear, Stuart Wade, Anna Madeley, Wendy Craig and Linda Armstrong

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: New GP and anaesthetist Dr Jeffrey Goodwin has a bad start to the day when he witnesses a car crash, gets attacked by one of the drivers involved and has his vehicle and possessions stolen on his way to the Royal. Back at the hospital, Cheritons mother Annette arrives to collect her dead sons things, surprising staff nurse Meryl Taylor by revealing a photo of his fiancee. Rural medical drama, starring Paul Fox

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: The concluding part of an interview with the Derry legend, who discusses his colourful football career and the place GAA has in society

programme.title: Dont Look Back in Anger
programme.desc: Headline stories from 2004, when a tsunami hit South East Asia, smoking was banned in public places and Cian OConnor won Olympic gold - only to have it taken off him

programme.title: Dont Look Back in Anger
programme.desc: Archive news documentary looking back at the headline stories of the past 20 years, focusing this week on 2005

programme.title: Animal Emergency
programme.desc: Old English sheepdog puppy Jessie has narrowly avoided death but now must undergo emergency surgery. Elsewhere in the hospital, owner Alan is determined to give his 13-year-old crossbreed Jessica as comfortable life as possible as she battles terminal kidney disease. Coco the alsatian is examined to see if she is a candidate to become a blood donor ,while Mary the heifer is operated on to correct a problem with her leg

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: The sports broadcaster talks to Tommy Martin about his childhood, his life as a footballer and his successful career as a journalist, radio host and TV pundit

programme.desc: The imminent arrival of the Prime Minister of Singapore has security on high alert, while Duty Manager Mel is excited to escort his favourite pop star

programme.desc: Two strangers with a substantial age gap are brought together, and each is challenged to find a suitable date for the other

programme.desc: Jackie learns that Jennifer has been digging for dirt on Evan, and Dolores housewarming party ends in tears when she takes Margarets side over Jennifers

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules
programme.desc: Katie plans a divorce party trip to Las Vegas and Lake Havasu but conveniently leaves Scheana off the guest list. Lala and Raquel find themselves flirting with the same guy

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade goes in search of a fish that swallowed a man whole, the fish that can eat someone from within, and another that uses an unusual entry point into the human body

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Joan bids a fond farewell to her friends at the hospital, but a last-minute intervention by her mother makes her reconsider her decision to leave. Meanwhile, Carnegie courts a wealthy patient in the hope of raising funds for the new hospital wing, and an alcoholic lets his family down at the worst possible moment. Hospital drama, starring Kananu Kirimi and Robert Cavanah

programme.desc: A profile of the former Leinster and Italy rugby player, who lost sight in his eye following a horrific injury

programme.desc: Set during the Group Stage of the 2019/20 UEFA Champions League season, episode two takes a deeper dive into the psychology of refereeing

programme.title: UEFA Man in the Middle
programme.desc: A look at the start of the knockout phase of the 2019/20 UEFA Champions League season, with the referees having to deal with the Covid-19 pandemic

programme.title: Cooking with the Stars
programme.desc: Emma Willis and Tom Allen present the celebrity cookery contest in which famous faces are mentored by world-class chefs to compete in culinary battles. In the first edition, actress Natalie Cassidy goes head to head with radio presenter Jordan North, and reality stars Jack Osbourne and Jessica Wright go up against each other, attempting to deliver gourmet dishes on a budget of just three pounds per portion. Who will go straight through and which two stars will face each other in the cook-off? Others taking part throughout the series are Hugh Dennis, Ekin-Su Culculoglu, Kelly Hoppen and Shaun Wright-Phillips

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: The sports broadcaster talks to Tommy Martin about his childhood, his life as a footballer and his successful career as a journalist, radio host and TV pundit

programme.title: The Six OClock Show
programme.desc: Chat show featuring celebrity interviews, food from leading chefs and guidance on a wide range of topics, from consumer affairs to the latest trends, with viewers invited to contribute with pictures, comments, stories and gossip

programme.title: Filthy Homes from Hell
programme.desc: A peek inside dirty and dismal dwellings, including Britains most insanitary student digs, which boast a bath coated in body fat, and a macabre zoo housing all manner of creatures. There is also a listed building that has not been cleaned for 400 years, the tragic story of a woman whose devotion to dogs cost her everything and the UKs worst rat infestation

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: The boxer talks about his life inside and outside the ring. From growing up as a triplet to when he became the first Irishman to win an Olympic Gold medal in boxing in 1992

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: Part two of two. The former Republic of Ireland manager opens up about life as a manager, taking the Ireland job twice, the 2002 World Cup, and the infamous relationship with Roy Keane

programme.title: Animal Emergency
programme.desc: Old English sheepdog puppy Jessie has narrowly avoided death but now must undergo emergency surgery. Elsewhere in the hospital, owner Alan is determined to give his 13-year-old crossbreed Jessica as comfortable life as possible as she battles terminal kidney disease. Coco the alsatian is examined to see if she is a candidate to become a blood donor ,while Mary the heifer is operated on to correct a problem with her leg

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Hundreds died when the Sobral Santos II capsized not far from the shores of the Amazon in September 1981, and many of the stricken passengers were reportedly dragged to their deaths by powerful unseen attackers. Freshwater detective Jeremy Wade attempts to identify the culprits that played a part in the rivers worst-ever boating disaster, but has the trail gone cold after more than 30 years?

programme.title: Cooking with the Stars
programme.desc: Emma Willis and Tom Allen host the grand final of the celebrity cooking contest - and the pressure is on as the three remaining stars battle it out in their toughest challenge yet but only one can be crowned as champion. Theyll be taking on their mentors signature dishes and whoever makes it through to the final round will have to deliver a three-course meal in an epic head-to-head battle in a bid to lift the sought-after Golden Frying Pan

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Real-life small-claims cases on issues affecting family life, presided over by outspoken former New York judge Judy Sheindlin

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Jay from Newton Aycliffe, Matt from Birkenhead, Brad from Watford and Carla from Edinburgh take on a Chaser. Bradley Walsh guides the contestants through a battle of wits in the hope that theyll go home with thousands of pounds

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Relationship-based reality show in which singletons seeking a romance compete in the hope of finding love - and winning a £50,000 prize

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: Daily magazine, featuring a mix of celebrity chat, showbusiness news, lifestyle features, topical discussion, health and beauty advice and more

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade investigates the stories behind supposedly deadly freshwater creatures, beginning by examining whether piranhas deserve their fearsome reputation. He travels to Brazil to swim in the Amazon with the fish and incites them into a feeding frenzy, before tracking down survivors and eyewitnesses of attacks

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: A mix-up over the job offer results in two new doctors arriving at the hospital to take up the position. Meanwhile, Catherine makes her feelings clear to Carnegie about their relationship and Stellas night out ends badly. Hospital drama, starring Robert Cavanah

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: Tommy Martin interviews the former Republic of Ireland footballer, who reflects on a career that began in the League of Ireland, and saw him move to the top of the English game

programme.title: UEFA Man in the Middle
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes as UEFA and its referees prepare for the final eight of the 2019/20 UEFA Champions League in Lisbon

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: The eight-time All-Ireland-winner talks about his journey of self-sacrifice, sense of identity, personal tragedy and an insatiable desire for success

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Another line-up of contestants answer questions that could change their lives - with lifelines, including Ask the Audience, Phone a Friend and 50-50 available to them if they get stuck. Jeremy Clarkson hosts

programme.title: Tour de Fred
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix is joined by his Olympic medal-winning diver daughter Andrea Spendolini-Sirieix to take on a series of cycle rides along the sometimes challenging but often spectacular roads of West Cork. The pair visit the butchers shop where black pudding was born, learn about the history of Barbary pirates, swap pedals for waves at a local surf school and share a seaside walk with alpacas

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.sub-title: The Sea Croft, Lytham St Annes
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi visits the Sea Croft, a struggling BandB in Lytham St Annes, Lancashire. Two years ago, owner Georgina gave up a career teaching business studies with a dream of running a successful guest house. Now, a £50,000 bill for unforeseen repairs and dismal occupancy has left her struggling to run the business. With her immaculate rooms lying empty, self-confessed neat freak Georgina cannot understand where she is going wrong. Alex can see the potential for success but getting Georgina to stop focusing on little details and start seeing the bigger picture does not prove easy

programme.title: Coma
programme.desc: Time is running out for Simon and Beth as their lies finally catch up with them. DS Kelly Evans starts to piece the puzzle together and races to find Simon, aware shes not the only one. The duo hide out at a hotel when their daughter Sophie has an asthma attack. Drama, starring Jason Watkins

programme.title: Cash Trapped
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Bradley Walsh in which six contestants battle it out across a series of fast-paced question rounds where the players must actively try to sabotage their opponents by beating them to the buzzer and trapping them out of the game. In the final round, the person who has earned the most cash will go head to head against the rest of the group to try to take their winnings home

programme.title: Cash Trapped
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Bradley Walsh in which six contestants battle it out across a series of fast-paced question rounds where the players must actively try to sabotage their opponents by beating them to the buzzer and trapping them out of the game. In the final round, the person who has earned the most cash will go head to head against the rest of the group to try to take their winnings home

programme.title: Hotel Benidorm: Fun-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Documentary following life at the Spanish Rio Park hotel and the holiday-makers to whom they cater. The first edition sees the staff ready to welcome thousands of Brits, but no sooner have they started than there is a problem when the lifts break down and they race to get them repaired

programme.title: Ireland AM
programme.desc: Ireland AM is the longest running daytime show in Ireland. Blending a mixture of lifestyle interviews and news content, with gardening, health, food and fashion seven days a week

programme.title: John and Lisas Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John Torode and Lisa Faulkner have recipes for summertime centrepieces for entertaining guests, including slow-cooked beef rendang, courgette and pea fritters, prawns served in a bread bowl, a ginger mocktail, and ricotta doughnuts with chocolate sauce

programme.title: Champions: Full Gallop
programme.desc: With millions in prize money on the line, the Cheltenham Festival is Jump racings biggest stage. On the opening day, the 2025 event begins with raw emotion as jockeys gather to honour Michael OSullivan. All eyes then turn to the fast and furious Champion Hurdle

programme.title: Heathrow: Britains Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. This time, the iconic Boeing 747 flies out of the airport for the final time, with plane spotters around the world hoping to bid it a fond farewell. Elsewhere, new cargo driver Dylan hopes his love for hypnosis can get him out of a jam

programme.title: Rookie Nurses
programme.desc: Wales youngest nurses continue to deal with all kinds of medical challenges thrown their way. In Carmarthen, theres no easing in for very newly qualified Caitlin who has to learn fast in her first week in AandE. Across the ward, her friend and colleague 22-year-old Mikey battles to keep a patient with severe hypothermia alive. On the Stroke Unit in Aberystwyth, a visit from Nelly the pet therapy dog lifts not just the patients spirits, but the nurses too, while nurse Gina helps keeps moral high on the ward with her funny banter

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Sunetra Sarker, Matty Lee, David Arnold and Basil Brush pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Britains Got Talent
programme.desc: Ant and Dec host as the auditions return to Blackpools Winter Gardens, with more acts taking to the stage with performances to impress the crowd and judges Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon and KSI. With the presenters yet to push their Golden Buzzer, might one of todays performers be just what the pair are looking for?

programme.title: News at 5.30
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the Virgin Media News team

programme.title: Celebrity Sabotage
programme.desc: Joel Dommett, Judi Love, Sam Thompson and GK Barry deceive unsuspecting members of the public as they take part in a fake love-themed show hosted by Matt and Emma Willis, who are also in on the whole thing and even get set their own mission in a hot tub. Plus, Olivia Attwood is the guest saboteur

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Cain is determined, while Matty delivers devastating news and Tracy is feeling heartbroken

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Todds friends discuss their evidence against Theo, Mal calls at Number 7 to deliver a bombshell to Dev, and Ollie urges Will to stop covering for Megan

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the quiz where each episode sees six hopefuls compete for £1 million. However, only one player can take their place in the Hot Seat at a time and answer multiple-choice questions to work their way up the Money Ladder

programme.desc: Cleanfluencer Brandon turns cleaning up into a tidy business, Tati and her crew tackle a filthy house and Just for Kicks revive some battered trainers

programme.title: Soham: Catching a Killer
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on the murders of Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman in 2002, detailing events of the desperate 14-day search by Cambridgeshire Police to the eventual discovery of their bodies

programme.title: Romesh Ranganathans Parents Evening
programme.desc: Alex Brooker and his mum Elaine, Jeff Brazier and his son Bobby, and Sophie Ellis-Bextor and her mum Janet Ellis compete in the comedy game show. If the contestants meet expectations they will get the money, but fall short and the cash is split between the other teams

programme.title: Living with Lucy
programme.desc: Presenter Lucy Kennedy gets to know comedian Brendan Grace. As well as inviting her into his home, he takes her on a tour of some places that are special to him. She watches as he entertains crowds both north and south of the border, the pair travel to some of Irelands beauty spots and take in a cruise on the river Shannon.

programme.title: Cracker
programme.sub-title: To Say I Love You - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of three. Fitzs life becomes more calamitous as he angers Penhaligon in a failed effort to make Judith jealous and turns a Gamblers Anonymous meeting into a card game. His only positive action is drawing up a profile of Sean and Tina, but the publicity it brings focuses the murderous couples anger on the police. Robbie Coltrane and Geraldine Somerville star, with Andrew Tiernan and Susan Lynch

programme.title: Betrayal
programme.desc: John and Mehreen recover from their stand-off with Asadi and the Stockport crime gang and with MI5 now finally on his side, John tracks the general to an upmarket hotel. programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: A mix of celebrity chat, lifestyle features, advice and competitions

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: The entire team becomes trapped in a perilous situation at the county jail, and as the odds mount against the crew, unresolved issues come to a head for Dawson and Pete. Meanwhile, Shay remains hopeful about her plans to start a family, and Herrmanns wife Cindy goes into labour

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Barrister Robert Rinder tells the story of Frances Molloy, whose 18-year-old son was killed in a coach crash in 2012, leading her to fight for changes to the law, making it illegal for buses and coaches to use tyres that are more than 10 years old. He also examines the 1973 case of David McGreavy, who murdered three children he was supposed to be looking after

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A girl disappears, prompting the police to begin a desperate search, convinced her errant father has snatched her. Blaketon decides to lend his expertise to the case - only to end up fighting for his life. Meanwhile, Crane and Bellamys dedication to duty sees them placing their lives on the line to rescue the youngster - but tragedy strikes. James Carlton, Mark Jordon and Derek Fowlds star

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A new recruit reports for his first day of work at the police station, but given his familys history in Aidensfield, not all of the villagers are pleased to see him. Meanwhile, Ben and Lizs fund-raising efforts appear to have rubbed off on Vernon, who begins to show his charitable side

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The residents of Aidensfield are terrorised by a blackmailer and Sergeant Merton is less than impressed by the investigative methods of the handsome newcomer PC Rob Walker. Meanwhile, Vernon embarks on a venture in the prestigious world of publishing, with the help of David and Bernie. Jonathan Kerrigan stars

programme.title: Agatha Christies Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth is asked to vet potential suitors vying for the hand of an Australian heiress and discreetly accompanies her on a rail journey aboard the Plymouth Express, only to find himself investigating a jewel theft. Mystery, with David Suchet and Julian Wadham

programme.title: Agatha Christies Poirot
programme.desc: Poirot visits a garden fete where he meets the son of an old friend and his fiancee. After having tea with the couple, the sleuth suspects that they are both in danger and Hastings new interest in photography provides him with the clue to solve a mystery involving cyanide, failing brakes and mixed-up love lives.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Theo ensures that Todd misses his marathon, Will refuses to join his family in condemning Megan, Adam suffers a dramatic loss of business, and Bernie and Dev find Mal waiting upon their return from holiday

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Theo tries a charm offensive on George and Christina, Kit panics when Mal names his attacker, Betsy and Dylan babysit Connie, and Hope warns Sam against listening to Daniel

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Theo stuns Todd by suggesting they get married right away, Bernie experiences divided loyalties to her son and husband, and Will struggles with being the focus of local gossip

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Bernie pays Mal a visit in his hotel room, George gains an insight into Theos treatment of Todd, Ben feels guilty for letting Will down, and Jodie offers Carla her childminding services

programme.title: Dont Look Back in Anger
programme.desc: Archive news documentary looking back at the headline stories of the past, focusing here on 2008

programme.title: Paul OGrady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: Paul meets Happi, a Nepalese mountain dog - a breed never featured on the show before - who is a lover of vegetarian food, putting the funnymans culinary skills to the test as he prepares the poochs dinner. He also befriends Rumble the greyhound, who has an unusual problem - he is so happy, his tail has become damaged with all the wagging it does. Finally, Paul hears the story of Parsnip and Carrot, both suspected victims of backstreet breeding. Parsnip in particular is in a bad way, with infected mammary glands as a result of a recent pregnancy

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Morse investigates an assassination attempt at an international sporting event, but the case is very quickly closed. While Thursday is determined to walk away, Morse delves deeper, getting drawn into a web of intrigue involving espionage, big business and a dark secret in the heart of the Oxford community. Meanwhile, Thursday faces a moral dilemma as he tries to protect a woman from her violent husband

programme.title: Dont Look Back in Anger
programme.desc: Chronicling the highs and lows of 2025 and all the chaos in between

programme.title: The Mayfair Hotel Megabuild
programme.desc: As the construction work nears completion, the hotel turns its attention to the interiors, employing some of the worlds top designers and craftspeople to meet the expectations of its well-heeled guests. A highlight is expected to be the new penthouse, which will span the entire rooftop of Claridges and feature four bedrooms, a swimming pool and its own lake - as well as a rumoured £100,000 a night price tag

programme.title: Hairy Bikers: Route 66
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King mount their bikes for the final leg of their epic journey along the American road. They begin in Las Vegas, where they learn how to make apparently the best mashed potato in the world - inspiring them to cook a massive lobster and prawn cocktail. Back on the road they finally reach California, where they follow the path of the 49ers during the gold rush and learn about cooking with marijuana - which is perfectly legal in Los Angeles. They also enjoy the best tacos they have ever eaten at a taco festival, before reaching Santa Monica pier - the end of their trip

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: The stories of two sons who were given up for adoption and the families who have stopped at nothing to find them. Andrew Barlow was adopted as a baby, but his birth mother Patricia Clark refused to sign the adoption papers and never gave up looking for him, while as a child, Julie Redman discovered that her mother Joan had given up her older brother for adoption

programme.title: Shetland
programme.desc: Calder receives some devastating news and Harry and Donnie worry as Tosh follows a controversial new theory. Intelligence from the Met puts Bobby Bain in a new light and Farida admits the truth behind Akmals death

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Todds friends discuss their evidence against Theo, Mal calls at Number 7 to deliver a bombshell to Dev, and Ollie urges Will to stop covering for Megan

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Cain is determined, while Matty delivers devastating news and Tracy is feeling heartbroken

programme.title: Anne
programme.desc: It is April 15, 1989 and Anne Williams says goodbye to her son as he heads to Hillsborough in Sheffield to watch Liverpool take on Nottingham Forest in the FA Cup semi-final, but she will never see him alive again. Fact-based drama about the woman who dedicated her life to campaigning for justice following her 15-year-old son Kevins death in the Hillsborough disaster. Maxine Peake stars

programme.title: Spies of Terror
programme.desc: The leads followed by Lucie and her team are not bearing fruit. Weakened by the Coalitions strikes, the Islamic State is suspected of preparing its last stand - a double attack on French soil. Spy thriller, starring Rachida Brakni, Fleur Geffrier, Vincent Elbaz and Pierre Perrier. In French

programme.title: Cold Feet
programme.desc: Karen is offered the job of editing Booker Prize-winning author Alex Welchs new novel, but cant decide whether to accept, until she claps eyes on him and realises hes handsome, charming and everything a man should be. Unfortunately, it isnt long before nanny Ramona overhears her reading a steamy passage from the manuscript aloud - and promptly gets hold of the wrong end of the stick. Hermione Norris and Denis Lawson star

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Geoff and Phil find two men acting suspiciously, but two others escape from the scene and the officers soon find themselves in danger and under siege. At the Aidensfield Arms the residents gather to watch the moon landing, although one guest gives Gina cause for concern

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Joys dream sends the three Merriwicks on a search for Phillip Harper, Joys father. Fantasy drama, starring Catherine Bell

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: How the Abrams Tank, the US Armys biggest land combat vehicle, is constructed, using access to the factory where they are built, as well as their testing grounds

programme.title: The Real Marigold Hotel
programme.desc: Eight celebrities embark on an experimental adventure to India to see whether they can set up a more rewarding life than in the UK. Enterpreneur Duncan Bannatyne, designer Zandra Rhodes, comedian Paul Chuckle Elliott, cricket legend Henry Blofeld, former EastEnder John Altman, actresses Britt Ekland and Susie Blake and singer Barbara Dickson arrive at their new home by the sea in Puducherry, and while Britt struggles with the heat and Paul misses his missus, Susie, Barbara and Zandra bond over a bit of traditional Indian cooking

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade turns his attention from freshwater mysteries to the worlds oceans, going in search of the real creature behind the enduring sea serpent legend. Starting in his own backyard, Jeremy fishes in the English Channel on the trail of a violent attack. His investigation leads him to Thailand where the mythology of the sea serpent reveals a vital clue, before he heads to the unlikely location of France where he tries to finally solve the mystery and have a sea serpent encounter of his own

programme.title: Iain Stirlings CelebAbility
programme.desc: Iain Stirling is joined by Scarlett Moffat as she leads a group of three friends looking to win a slew of fabulous prizes by defeating four celebrities - Rachel Riley, James Lock, Amber Gill and Kae Kurd - in a series of silly games based on the unusual abilities the celebs believe they possess

programme.title: Party Animals

programme.title: Tell Me Everything
programme.desc: Coming-of-age drama. Jonny has moved to a new town, made a fresh start at a new college and has a whole new group of friends, but will they help him attract the attention of fellow new student Bex? Meanwhile, Naisha is cramping best friend Dylans style and Ella is devastated when an exposing video goes viral

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. programme.sub-title: The One with the Race Car Bed

programme.sub-title: The One with the Giant Poking Device

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang holds an American football match on Thanksgiving. Opposing team captains Ross and Monica relive their sibling rivalry on the pitch, while Joey tries to outflank Chandler

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel hands in her notice at Central Perk, while Ross accidentally breaks a girls leg and ends up having to go door to door peddling cookies. Joey starts a new job selling Christmas trees, but Phoebe thinks it is a cruel trade and sets about saving the merchandise

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Cant Remember Which Sister
programme.desc: Rachels attractive and influential new friend sends Ross into a jealous frenzy, while Chandler gets drunk and falls for the curvaceous charms of one of Joeys many sisters - but later cannot remember which one

programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the game show from locations around the UK, setting members of the public unusual challenges for a chance to win anything from the price of their petrol, to £1000 in the big finale game. This week, Stephen is in Bristol

programme.title: The Chase

programme.title: Yes Chef
programme.desc: Theo Randall puts three amateur cooks through a series of culinary challenges, including how to make linguine asparagus carbonara, choosing one of them to join him in the final

programme.title: Inside MandS
programme.desc: Filmed over a year and with unprecedented access, for the first time, cameras have been invited inside every corner of MandS - from the build of a multi-million-pound store to top secret development kitchens at HQ. Store manager Dior prepares for the move to a new £15million shop, as well as the creation of a Percy Pig product the marketing team are hoping will rescue the little-known beauty department, and after years of fighting bad reviews and poor sales, the daring and bold new womens autumnwear range

programme.desc: Prestige Pawnbrokers boss James Constantinou mixes business with pleasure as he heads to Spain to meet an entrepreneur friend whos looking to get a £100,000 loan on his luxury 18-metre yacht. A young widow finds it difficult to part with her late husbands vintage car to set up a new life in Croatia, jewellery expert Monika is shocked when shes asked to deal with a golden rat, and the shop staff struggle to put a price on some rare and problematic black coral statues

And Benedict Cumberbatch talks about playing a newly widowed father in The Thing with Feathers. Plus, Robbie Williams performs Pretty Face from the forthcoming album BRITPOP

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show

Meanwhile, Jamie Dornan previews Saturday Night Live UK, which he is guest hosting
